text.en: If your Army Faction is **ASURYANI**, at the start of the battle round, you receive a number of Battle Focus tokens based on the battle size, as shown in the table below.

Each time one of the triggers shown in the Agile Manoeuvres section below occurs, you can spend one Battle Focus token to enable the relevant eligible unit to perform that Agile Manoeuvre. A unit is eligible to perform an Agile Manoeuvre if it has this ability and has not already performed an Agile Manoeuvre in the same phase. Unless otherwise stated, you cannot trigger the same Agile Manoeuvre more than once per phase. At the end of the battle round, all unspent Battle Focus tokens are lost.
Agile Manoeuvres
Each time a **HARLEQUINS** model from your army makes a Charge move, it can move through enemy models.

In the Declare Battle Formations step you can set up **ASURYANI MOUNTED** and **VYPER** units from your army in Reserves. During the battle, such units can be set up on the battlefield as if they were arriving from Strategic Reserves. For the purposes of setting up **ASURYANI MOUNTED** or **VYPER** units from your army on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

In addition, at the end of your opponent’s turn, you can select a number of **ASURYANI MOUNTED** or **VYPER** units from your army (excluding units within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units), then remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves. The maximum number of units you can select depends on the battle size, as shown below.

Weapons equipped by **HARLEQUINS MOUNTED** and **HARLEQUINS VEHICLE** models from your army have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

Each time a **HARLEQUINS** unit from your army disembarks from a **TRANSPORT**, until the end of the turn, that unit’s weapons have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.
While a friendly Harlequins unit is making a charge move, that unit can move through enemy models. This detachment has the Acrobatic tag and cannot be taken with another Acrobatic detachment.
text.de: Während eine befreundete Harlekin-Einheit eine Angriffsbewegung ausführt, kann sich jene Einheit durch feindliche Modell bewegen. Dieses Kontingent hat die Kennzeichnung Akrobatisch und kann nicht zusammen mit einem anderen Kontingent mit der Kennzeichnung ­Akrobatisch gewählt werden.
text.es: Cuando una unidad Arlequines amiga haga un movimiento de carga, puede mover a través de miniaturas enemigas. Este destacamento tiene la etiqueta Acróbatas y no puede incluirse junto a otro destacamento Acróbatas.
text.fr: Lorsqu’une unité d’Arlequins amie fait un mouvement de charge, elle peut se déplacer à travers les figurines ennemies. Ce détachement a l’étiquette Acrobatique et ne peut pas être pris avec un autre détachement Acrobatique.
text.it: Fintanto che un’unità di Arlecchini amica effettua un movimento di carica, può attraversare i modelli nemici. Questo distaccamento ha il descrittore Acrobatismo e non può essere preso con un altro distaccamento Acrobatismo.
text.ja: 味方ハーレクィン・ユニットが突撃移動を行っている間、そのユニットは敵兵を通り抜けて移動できる。 このデタッチメントは軽業タグを持ち、他の軽業タグを持つデタッチメントと同時に編制できない。
text.ko: 아군 할리퀸 유닛이 돌격 이동을 수행하는 동안, 그 유닛은 적 모델을 통과하여 이동할 수 있습니다. 이 디태치먼트에 곡예 태그가 부여되며 다른 곡예 디태치먼트와 함께 선택할 수 없습니다.
text.zh: 在一个己方丑角单位进行一次冲锋移动时，那个单位可以移动穿过敌方模型。 本分遣队拥有杂技标签，并且不能与另一个拥有杂技标签的分遣队被一同纳入军队中。

text.en:
Each time an **ASURYANI PSYKER** model from your army is destroyed by an enemy unit, that enemy unit gains a Vengeful Dead token. Each time a **WRAITH CONSTRUCT** model from your army makes an attack that targets a unit with one or more Vengeful Dead tokens, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

**ASURYANI PSYKER** models from your army have the following ability:

**Spirit Guides (Aura):** While a **WRAITHBLADES**, **WRAITHGUARD** or **WRAITHLORD** unit from your army is within 12" of this model, that unit has the Battle Focus ability.
Friendly Harlequins units have Stealth. This detachment has the ACROBATIC tag and cannot be taken with another ACROBATIC detachment.
text.de: Befreundete Harlekin-Einheiten haben Tarnung. Dieses Kontingent hat die Kennzeichnung Akrobatisch und kann nicht zusammen mit einem anderen Kontingent mit der Kennzeichnung Akrobatisch gewählt werden.
text.es: Las unidades Arlequines amigas tienen Sigilo. Este destacamento tiene la etiqueta ACRÓBATAS y no puede incluirse junto a otro destacamento ACRÓBATAS.
text.fr: Les unités d’Arlequins amies ont Discrétion. Ce détachement a l'étiquette Acrobatique et ne peut pas pris avec un autre détachement Acrobatique.
text.it: Le unità di Arlecchini amiche hanno Furtività. Questo distaccamento ha il descrittore Acrobatismo e non può essere preso con un altro distaccamento Acrobatismo.
text.ja: 味方ハーレクィン・ユニットは『隠密能力』を持つ。 このデタッチメントは軽業タグを持ち、他の軽業タグを持つデタッチメントと同時に編制できない。
text.ko: 아군 할리퀸 유닛에 스텔스를 부여합니다. 이 디태치먼트에 곡예 태그가 부여되며 다른 곡예 디태치먼트와 함께 선택할 수 없습니다.
text.zh: 己方丑角单位拥有隐匿。 本分遣队拥有杂技标签，并且不能与另一个拥有杂技标签的分遣队被一同纳入军队中。

text.en: You can use the following rules:
Lethal Intent

At the end of your opponent’s Shooting phase, if one or more **YNNARI** units from your army were destroyed this phase, select one **YNNARI INFANTRY** or **YNNARI MOUNTED** unit from your army that was within 6" of your destroyed unit. That unit can make a Normal move of up to D6+1".
Lethal Surge
Once per turn, when a **YNNARI** unit from your army performs the Fade Back Agile Manouvre, it can make a **surge move** of up to D6+1" instead of a **normal move**.
Lethal Reprisal

At the start of the Fight phase, select one **YNNARI** unit from your army (excluding **TITANIC** units) that is below its Starting Strength. Until the end of the phase, that unit has the Fights First ability.

Each time a **DIRE AVENGER, GUARDIAN, SUPPORT WEAPON** or **WAR WALKER** model from your army makes an attack, if that model’s unit and/or the target unit are within range of one or more objective markers, add 1 to the Hit roll.

While an objective marker is under your control, each time an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move within range of that objective marker, roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

**ANHRATHE** units from your army have the following ability:

**Void Thieves:** At the end of a phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

Each time you add an **ANHRATHE** unit to your army, it can be given up to one Corsair Enhancement. Each Corsair Enhancement included in your army must be unique. If a unit is given a Corsair Enhancement, you must increase the points cost of that unit by the amount shown (see *Munitorum* *Field Manual*). If this causes your army to exceed the points limit for the battle you are playing, you cannot include that unit in your army.

**AELDARI** units in your army are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced. In addition, each time an **ANHRATHE**, **RANGERS** or **SHROUD RUNNERS** unit from your army Advances, you can re‑roll the Advance roll.

Each time you add an **ANHRATHE** unit to your army, it can be given up to one Corsair Enhancement. Each Corsair Enhancement included in your army must be unique. If a unit is given a Corsair Enhancement, you must increase the points cost of that unit by the amount shown (see *Munitorum Field Manual*). If this causes your army to exceed the points limit for the battle you are playing, you cannot include that unit in your army.
When a friendly Rangers/Shroud Runners unit is selected to shoot, enemy units have +6" detection range until that friendly unit has shot.
text.de: Wenn eine befreundete Weltenläufer-/Windläufer-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird, haben feindliche Einheiten +6" Entdeckungsreichweite, bis jene befreundete Einheit geschossen hat.
text.es: Cuando una unidad Exploradores/Cazadoras Sudario amiga se elige para disparar, las unidades enemigas tienen +6" al alcance de detección hasta que esa unidad enemiga haya disparado.
text.fr: Quand une unité de Rangers/Coureurs Mirages amie est choisie pour tirer, les unités ennemies ont +6" en portée de détection jusqu’à ce que cette unité amie ait tiré.
text.it: Quando un’unità di Esploratori/Solcavelo amica viene scelta per tirare, le unità nemiche hanno +6" alla distanza di individuazione finché quell’unità amica non ha tirato.
text.ja: 味方レンジャー/シュラウドランナー・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時、その味方ユニットの射撃が終了するまで、敵ユニットの発見範囲は+6mvの修正を受ける。
text.ko: 아군 방랑자/장막 질주기 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때, 그 아군 유닛이 사격을 종료할 때까지 적 유닛에 발각 범위 +6"를 적용합니다.
text.zh: 在一个己方游侠/帷幕奔行者单位被选择进行射击时，直到那个己方单位完成射击前，敌方单位的侦测范围 +6"。

text.en: Friendly <k>Aeldari Vehicle</k> units’ ranged attacks have <k>[Assault]</k>.
text.es: Los ataques a distancia de las unidades <k>Vehículo Aeldari</k> amigas tienen <k>[Asalto]</k>.
text.fr: Les attaques de tir des unités de <k>Véhicule Aeldari</k> amies ont <k>[Assaut]</k>.
text.it: Gli attacchi da tiro delle unità <k>Veicolo</k> degli <k>Aeldari</k> amiche hanno <k>[Assalto]</k>.
text.ja: 味方<k>アエルダリ・ビークル</k>・ユニットの射撃攻撃は<k>［アサルト］</k>を持つ。
text.ko: 아군 <k>엘다리 기체</k> 유닛의 원거리 공격에 <k>[기동 사격]</k>을 부여합니다.
text.zh: 己方<k>艾达灵族载具</k>单位的远程武器拥有<k>[突击]</k>技能。

text.en: At the start of the first battle round, you generate Fate dice by rolling a number of D6 based on the battle size, as shown below. Keep your Fate dice to one side – this is your Fate dice pool.

Each time you use one of the Stratagems opposite, if your Fate dice pool contains one or more Fate dice showing the corresponding value in the table below, you can discard one of those corresponding Fate dice. If you do, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

■ At the start of the battle round, you receive 1 additional Battle Focus token.
■ Each time a unit from your army performs the Swift as the Wind Agile Manoeuvre, until the end of the phase, add an additional 1" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.
■ Each time a unit from your army performs an Agile Manoeuvre that involves rolling a D6, add 1 to the result.

Each time an **ASPECT WARRIORS** or **AVATAR OF KHAINE** unit from your army is selected to shoot or fight, select one of the following abilities for it to gain until the end of the phase:

■ Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.
■ Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

target.en: One **ASURYANI MOUNTED** or **VYPER** unit from your army that was set up on the battlefield from Reserves this turn and has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Streaking suddenly down from on high, the Aeldari strike like the fall of an executioner’s blade.

target.en: One **ASURYANI MOUNTED** or **VYPER** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: Able to analyse and assess target data at incredible speeds, these Aeldari isolate the foe’s weak spot and pour all their fire into it as they hurtle past.

target.en: One **ASURYANI MOUNTED** or **VYPER** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

fluff.en: None but the Aeldari could risk such breakneck and seemingly suicidal evasive manoeuvres to jink around incoming enemy fire.

target.en: One **TROUPE** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, when using your unit’s Dance of Death ability, you can select three of the abilities for your unit to gain, instead of one.

fluff.en: Many are the heads of the brood, and many their fangs. As they spring and tumble over their foes, the Harlequins’ weapons echo the multiplicity of strikes unleashed by that mythic nest of snakes.

target.en: That **WRAITHBLADES**, **WRAITHLORD** or **WRAITHKNIGHT** unit.

when.en: Your Charge phase, just after a **WRAITHBLADES**, **WRAITHLORD** or **WRAITHKNIGHT** unit from your army ends a Charge move.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit and roll one D6 for each **WRAITHBLADES** model in your unit, or roll four D6 if your unit has the **WRAITHLORD** keyword, or roll six D6 if your unit has the **WRAITHKNIGHT** keyword: for each 3+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

fluff.en: Elegant they may be, but the weight and implacable strength of wraith constructs on the charge can smash enemies to the ground bloody and broken.

target.en: One **AELDARI PSYKER** model from your army and one friendly **WRAITH CONSTRUCT** unit within 12" of it that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit visible to your **PSYKER** model. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your **WRAITH CONSTRUCT** unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Armour Penetration and/or Damage characteristics of that attack.

fluff.en: Seeing their prey as much through the eyes of their guiding seer as with any sense of their own, the wraith constructs strike swift and true.

target.en: One **WRAITH CONSTRUCT** unit from your army (excluding **TITANIC** units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

fluff.en: The apparent fragility of wraith constructs’ lithe bodies belies their incredible resilience.

target.en: One **WRAITHBLADES**, **WRAITHLORD** or **WRAITHKNIGHT** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

fluff.en: Sometimes, the twinned perceptions of ghost warriors allow them to perceive – and strike at – the souls of their foes.

target.en: One **YNNARI INFANTRY** or **YNNARI MOUNTED** unit from your army (excluding **WRAITH CONSTRUCT** units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Such is the conviction and power of the Ynnari that sometimes even mortal wounds cannot slow them.

target.en: That **YNNARI INFANTRY** unit.

when.en: Fight phase, just after a **YNNARI INFANTRY** unit from your army has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1. If your unit is below its Starting Strength, you can re‑roll the Hit roll instead.

fluff.en: Immersed in murder and gripped by holy purpose, these warriors bring Ynnead’s fatal message and his final gift to all who face them.

target.en: One **YNNARI** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** and **[IGNORES COVER]** abilities

fluff.en: Perceiving the flickering soulstuff of their foes, the Ynnari strike with ruthless precision.

target.en: One **DIRE AVENGERS** or **GUARDIANS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of one or more objective markers, you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Woe betide the foe that seeks to claim the holdings of armed and determined Asuryani.

target.en: One **DIRE AVENGERS** or **GUARDIANS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: If your unit is within range of one or more objective markers, until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Exploiting a spar of old Aeldari technology, these warriors engage the flickering ghosts of ancient defensive force fields.

target.en: One **WAR WALKERS** unit from your army.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a **DIRE AVENGERS** or **GUARDIANS** unit from your army

effect.en: After that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks, it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

restrictions.en: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle round.

fluff.en: Swift and terrible vengeance comes for those who dare strike down the warriors of the Aeldari in the form of searing heavy weapons fire.

target.en: One **Dire AVENGERS** or **GUARDIANS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[PISTOL]** ability.

fluff.en: Asuryani martial teachings enable those wielding ranged weapons to employ them as close‑quarter implements of death as well.

target.en: One **AELDARI** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: The Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If your unit has the **ANHRATHE** keyword, then until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re‑roll the Wound roll instead.

fluff.en: In their pursuit of riches, Anhrathe warriors will fight with violent fury to seize their due.

target.en: One **ANHRATHE**, **RANGERS** or **SHROUD RUNNERS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is less than the highest Toughness characteristic of models in the target unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

fluff.en: By accurately targeting weak points in anatomies and superstructures, the Anhrathe can bring down even the most resilient of foes.

target.en: One **ASURYANI INFANTRY** unit from your army (excluding **WRAITH CONSTRUCT** units) that has not been selected to shoot this phase and is within 9" of one or more friendly **ASURYANI PSYKER** models.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability and each time a model in your unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: The Aeldari have already seen how best to lay low this enemy and strike in the sure knowledge the foe cannot evade their terrible fate.

target.en: One **ASURYANI** unit from your army (excluding **WRAITH CONSTRUCT** units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Processing events at incredible speed, these warriors easily evade attacks that would have slain any less celeritous combatants.

target.en: One **ASURYANI** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability while targeting an enemy unit within 12". If such a weapon already has that ability, until the end of the phase, each time an attack is made with that weapon, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

fluff.en: When unleashed in a close‑ranged storm, Aeldari weapons fire can completely eradicate all life within the target zone.

target.en: One **ASPECT WARRIORS** or **AVATAR OF KHAINE** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill, Weapon skill, Strength, Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

fluff.en: So absolute is the focus of these warriors in battle that nothing can distract them or stay their blows.

target.en: One **AVATAR OF KHAINE** model from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your model’s Wailing Doom ranged weapon has a Range characteristic of 18" and a Damage characteristic of 8.

fluff.en: Cast with the force of a thunderbolt, the Avatar’s weapon strikes the foe with meteoric force.

target.en: One **ASPECT WARRIORS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can remove one Aspect Shrine token your unit has (see datasheets). Then, select one of the following abilities, or select two of the following abilities if you removed an Aspect Shrine token during this usage of this Stratagem: **[IGNORES COVER]**, **[LETHAL HITS]**, **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]**. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected abilities.

fluff.en: Analysing their targets’ weaknesses with incredible skill, the Aeldari fire for lethal effect.

target.en: One **AELDARI INFANTRY** unit from your army (excluding **WRAITH CONSTRUCT** units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

fluff.en: Inspired by their prince, who has felt Ynnead’s touch, the Eldritch Raiders laugh in the face of death.

target.en: One **ASURYANI PSYKER** model from your army within 9" of that enemy unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Roll six D6: for each 3+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

fluff.en: Leaping from the seer’s outstretched hand, this blast of empyric energy is a raw expression of the sorrow and bitterness suffered by the Aeldari people.

target.en: One **HARLEQUINS CHARACTER** model from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase.

effect.en: At the end of the phase, set your model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with half of its starting number of wounds remaining.

restrictions.en: Each model can only be targeted with this Stratagem once per battle.

fluff.en: A feigned death and sudden, shocking return are as impactful as dismaying to the foe.

target.en: One **HARLEQUINS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: Though they may be slain, this step of the saedath calls on the players to act out the demise of tragic heroes who take their enemies with them to death.

target.en: That **HARLEQUINS** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after a **HARLEQUINS** unit from your army Falls Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

fluff.en: *The Harlequins tumble away in mock terror and panic before spinning back into the fight with cruel laughter and redoubled fury.*

target.en: One **TROUPE** unit from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

fluff.en: To the Harlequins, the foe are simply unwitting dance partners, their every move matched with graceful aplomb.

target.en: One **HARLEQUINS INFANTRY** or **HARLEQUINS MOUNTED** unit from your army that is within 6" of one or more enemy units and would be eligible to declare a charge against one or more of those enemy units if it were your Charge phase.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Charge phase.

effect.en: Your unit now declares a charge that only targets one or more of those enemy units, and you resolve that charge.

restrictions.en: Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

fluff.en: Enemies goaded into following the steps of the saedath come unwittingly on cue to their executions.

target.en: One **HARLEQUINS** unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: Players know when to fade back from the stage of war, ready to strike again when their moment comes.

target.en: One **ASURYANI MOUNTED** unit from your army that destroyed one or more enemy units this phase.

when.en: End of your Shooting phase or the end of the Fight phase.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 7".

fluff.en: These airborne warriors arc up and away from the ruin of their foes, already seeking fresh prey.

target.en: One **ASURYANI MOUNTED** or **VYPER** unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

fluff.en: Warriors such as these cannot be pinned down or held back. They hit and run at will, hammering the foe with constant fire and slashing blows.

target.en: One **ASURYANI MOUNTED** or **VYPER** unit from your army in Reserves.

when.en: The Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, when setting up your unit on the battlefield from Reserves, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units. When doing so, if your unit is set up within 8" horizontally of one or more enemy units, until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

fluff.en: Some of the Windrider Hosts are especially aggressive, unable to restrain the fierce joy of racing perilously close to the foe while strafing them with fire.

target.en: One **HARLEQUINS VEHICLE** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: After your unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". Until the end of the turn, your unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

fluff.en: Embodying the serpent that strikes with blinding swiftness, this grav-skimmer lunges suddenly into range and unleashes its full fury on the foe.

target.en: One **HARLEQUINS** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

fluff.en: Springing between pillars and rubble, bounding forwards as though running on thin air, the Harlequins acrobatically hurl themselves into battle.

target.en: One **HARLEQUINS MOUNTED** unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase.

when.en: End of your Fight phase.

effect.en: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move. Otherwise, your unit can make a Fall Back move of up to 6".

fluff.en: Inescapable yet impossible to catch, this unit personifies the ever-winding and incorporeal coils of the Skyweavers of myth.

target.en: One **HARLEQUINS INFANTRY** unit from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

fluff.en: Maintaining their blistering pace, these warriors respond to their foes’ steps in the saedath with their own gravity-defying motions.

target.en: One **HARLEQUINS VEHICLE** or **HARLEQUINS MOUNTED** unit from your army.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: Like a serpent rearing back to strike at its prey anew, the Harlequins sweep high and appear to quit the field, ready to descend in fury a moment later.

target.en: One **WRAITHBLADES**, **WRAITHGUARD** or **WRAITHLORD** unit from your army and one **ASURYANI PSYKER** model from your army.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Until the start of your next Command phase, your **WRAITHBLADES**, **WRAITHGUARD** or **WRAITHLORD** unit is considered to be within 12" of your **PSYKER** model for the purposes of the Psychic Guidance and Spirit Guides abilities.

fluff.en: It is risky for a Spiritseer to cast their awareness so far, but aiding the dead is sometimes necessary.

target.en: One **WRAITHBLADES** or **WRAITHGUARD** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of your Movement phase.

effect.en: Select one objective marker you control that your unit is within range of. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

fluff.en: By leaving psycho‑resonant wraithbone markers upon the battlefield, these warriors wreathe vital strategic locations in an aura of dread not easily overcome.

target.en: One **YNNARI** unit from your army that was just destroyed while it was within range of one or more objective markers you controlled at the end of the previous phase. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase.

effect.en: Select one of those objective markers. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

fluff.en: Even after they fall, the most fervent Ynnari leave a sinister sense of watchfulness in their wake like some invisible death shroud.

target.en: One **YNNARI** unit from your army (excluding **WRAITH CONSTRUCT** units), if one or more models in that unit were destroyed this phase.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Shooting phase.

effect.en: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase.

fluff.en: As the foe slays their warriors, a terrible vigour grips the Ynnari and compels them to repay the slaughter in kind.

target.en: One **STORM GUARDIANS** unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit. Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

fluff.en: Storm Guardians train to recognise where and when their selfless aggression can best benefit their craftworld and never to miss such opportunities.

target.en: One **GUARDIANS** unit from your army.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. When doing so, return every destroyed **GUARDIANS** model to your unit.

fluff.en: In so desperate and vital a fight, the Aeldari must accept casualties they would normally avoid and even send fresh warriors in to bolster the flagging ranks if it means victory.

target.en: That **AELDARI** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after an **AELDARI** unit from your army Falls Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If it is an **ANHRATHE** unit, also select one enemy unit your unit was within Engagement Range of at the start of the phase, and roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

fluff.en: With a final flurry of gunshots, blade strikes and explosives, these warriors feign retreat before striking again with renewed aggression.

target.en: One **RANGERS** or **SHROUD RUNNERS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** and **[RAPID FIRE 1]** abilities, and until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

fluff.en: Anhrathe raiders often find common ground with other Aeldari Outcasts, who use the distraction of the Corsair onslaught to ambush unsuspecting foes.

target.en: That **ANHRATHE** unit.

when.en: Your Shooting phase, just after an **ANHRATHE** unit from your army destroyed one or more enemy units.

effect.en: After your unit has resolved all of its shooting attacks, it can make a Normal move of up to D6+1".

fluff.en: Corsair raiders are swift to exploit gaps in the enemy line and advance upon their objectives.

target.en: One **AELDARI INFANTRY** unit from your army that is within range of an objective marker that you control and that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Stealth ability and your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

fluff.en: Having secured their prize, the Anhrathe melt into the shadows, leaving their foes shooting at shadows.

target.en: One **AELDARI INFANTRY** unit from your army, if one or more models in that unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, and if that **AELDARI** unit is neither Battle‑shocked nor within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

effect.en: Your unit can make a surge move of up to D6+1".

fluff.en: Anhrathe share bonds forged in battle. The loss of an ally inspires sorrow and fury in equal measure.

target.en: One **ANHRATHE** unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: Command phase.

effect.en: Until the start of the next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit.

fluff.en: Even as battle rages around them, the Eldritch Raiders prioritise the seizing of treasures above the destruction of their foes.

target.en: One **CORSAIR VOIDSCARRED** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or Fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack.

fluff.en: These are Yriel’s chosen killers, and there is no escape for their prey.

target.en: One **ANHRATHE** unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. If that unit is below Starting Strength, return all destroyed models (excluding **CHARACTER** models) to that unit.

fluff.en: Prince Yriel commands resources beyond the dreams of most Corsair Princes. Depleted bands may fall back from the battlefield to be reinforced and resupplied at a moment’s notice.

target.en: One **ASURYANI PSYKER** model from your army.

when.en: Command phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to your model. That enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

fluff.en: The seer plucks fate to find the foe suffering a horrible death, then projects it into their minds.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Having foreseen already how this fight will play out, the seer projects their insights and warnings into the minds of the Aeldari who must fight it.

target.en: One **ASURYANI INFANTRY** unit from your army (excluding **WRAITH CONSTRUCT** units) that has not been selected to move this phase, was not set up on the battlefield this phase, and is within 9" of one or more friendly **ASURYANI PSYKER** models.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en:
• Place your unit in **strategic reserves**.
• Your unit has **Deep Strike**.
• Your unit must make an **ingress move** this phase.

restrictions.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit is not eligible to be selected to move.

fluff.en: Dispelling the psychosomatic mirage that has so far beguiled and assailed the foe, the seer reveals the true location of the warriors it was masquerading as.

target.en: One **ASURYANI INFANTRY** unit from your army (excluding **WRAITH CONSTRUCT** units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks and is within 9" of one or more friendly **ASURYANI PSYKER** models.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

fluff.en: A twist of the seer’s psychic powers raises a whirling shield of empyric energy and psychokinetic debris to screen the Aeldari from enemy fire.

effect.en: If your **ASURYANI** unit is wholly within 6” of that **TRANSPORT**, it can embark within it.

fluff.en: The Aeldari excel in striking swiftly, then leaping back into the safety of their skimming transports.

target.en: That **ASURYANI** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after an **ASURYANI** unit from your army Falls Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

fluff.en: What appears to be a full retreat one moment is revealed as the deceptive prelude to a devastating attack the next.

target.en: That **ASURYANI** unit.

when.en: Your Shooting phase, just after an **ASURYANI INFANTRY** unit from your army (excluding **AIRCRAFT**, **ASURMEN** and **WRAITH CONSTRUCT** units) has shot.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6+1".

fluff.en: The Aeldari are masters of hit‑and‑run tactics, engaging a target with a flurry of shots before swiftly ducking back out of harm’s way.

target.en: One **ASURYANI INFANTRY** unit from your army that is wholly within 9" of one or more battlefield edges.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: By slipping away into the ethereal confines of the Webway, Aeldari warriors can circumnavigate the foe and strike from new and unexpected quarters.

target.en: One **ASPECT WARRIORS** or **AVATAR OF KHAINE** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can remove one Aspect Shrine token your unit has (see datasheets). Then, until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if you removed an Aspect Shrine token during this usage of this Stratagem. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: As champions and defenders of a dying race, these warriors fight furiously to the very end.

fluff.en: The Aeldari excel in striking swiftly then leaping back into the safety of their skimming transports.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) is selected to Fall Back.

effect.en: All models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle‑shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

fluff.en: Embodying the rage of Khaine himself, these warriors press home their attack and strike down those cowards who seek to flee their fury.

target.en: One **YNNARI** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: In the moment of transcendent glory, before the Ynnari give their essence to their god, they fight harder than ever to take the foe with them to death.

target.en: One **RANGERS**, **SHROUD RUNNERS** or **STARFANG** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit (excluding **TITANIC** units) visible to and within 36" of your unit. Until the end of the phase, each time that enemy unit declares a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

fluff.en: As the foes attempt to close in, Yriel’s cunning outcasts stymie their assault with a dazzling burst of distracting fire.

effect.it: Colloca la tua unità nelle riserve strategiche.

fluff.en: Players know when to fade back from the stage of war, ready to strike again when their moment comes.
fluff.de: Die Darsteller wissen genau, wann sie von der Bühne des Krieges abgehen sollten, um ein andermal zuzuschlagen, wenn der rechte Moment da ist.
fluff.es: Los intérpretes saben cuándo abandonar el escenario de la guerra, para volver a atacar llegado el momento oportuno.
fluff.fr: Les Comédiens savent quand s’effacer de la scène de la guerre, prêts à frapper de nouveau quand le moment sera venu.
fluff.it: Gli attori sanno quando ritirarsi dal palcoscenico della guerra, pronti ad attaccare di nuovo quando verrà il loro momento.
fluff.ja: 演者は戦争の舞台からいつ退くべきかを知っており、その瞬間が来たら再び攻撃する準備ができている。
fluff.ko: 배우는 전쟁의 무대에서 언제 내려와야 할지를 안다. 그리해야 다시 기회가 왔을 때 또다시 무대에 오를 수 있으므로.
fluff.zh: 舞者们知道在什么时候离开战争的舞台，在时机到来的时候再次出击。

target.en: That <k>Harlequins Infantry</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ハーレクィン・インファントリー</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of a friendly unengaged Harlequins Infantry unit.
when.de: Bewegungsphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine Bewegung innerhalb von 8" um eine befreundete Harlekin-Infanterie-Einheit beendet, die nicht im Nahkampf ist
when.es: En la fase de movimiento del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga termina un movimiento a 8" o menos de una unidad Infantería Arlequines amiga no trabada.
when.fr: À la phase de Mouvement adverse, quand une unité ennemie finit un mouvement à 8" ou moins d’une unité d’Arlequins d’Infanterie amie non engagée.
when.it: Nella fase di Movimento dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica termina un movimento entro 8" da un’unità di Fanteria degli Arlecchini amica non ingaggiata.
when.ja: 敵軍側移動フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方の非接敵状態であるハーレクィン・インファントリー・ユニットの8mv以内に一部でも入っている位置で移動を終了した時。
when.ko: 상대의 이동 페이즈, 적 유닛이 교전 상태가 아닌 아군 할리퀸 보병 유닛의 8" 내에서 이동을 종료할 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的移动阶段中，当一个敌方单位在一个不处于交战状态的己方丑角步兵单位的 8" 内结束一次移动时。

effect.en: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".
effect.de: Deine Einheit kann eine normale Bewegung von bis zu W3+3" ausführen.
effect.es: Tu unidad puede hacer un movimiento normal de hasta 1D3+3".
effect.fr: Votre unité peut faire un mouvement normal de D3+3" maximum.
effect.it: La tua unità può effettuare un movimento normale di massimo D3+3".
effect.ja: その自軍側ユニットは、最大D3+3mvまでの通常移動を行える。
effect.ko: 이 유닛은 최대 D3+3"의 일반 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位可以进行一次最多 D3+3" 的常规移动。

fluff.en: Advancing foes assured of cutting the Harlequins down are often left thwarted with naught but a swirl of holofield shards where their prey once stood.
fluff.de: Vorrückende Feinde, die sich sicher sind, die Harlekine nun niedermachen zu können, bekommen oft nichts in die Finger außer einem Wirbel aus Holofeldsplittern, wo gerade noch ihre Beute stand.
fluff.es: Los enemigos que avanzan, seguros de abatir a los Arlequines, a menudo se ven frustrados al hallar solo un remolino de fragmentos del holocampo donde una vez estuvo su presa.
fluff.fr: Des ennemis assurés de faucher les Arlequins se retrouvent souvent sans plus qu’un tourbillon d’éclats d’holo-champ là ou leur proie se tenait un instant plus tôt.
fluff.it: I nemici sicuri di riuscire ad abbattere gli Arlecchini spesso si ritrovano con un pugno di schegge di olocampo al posto della preda.
fluff.ja: ハーレクィンを仕留められると確信を抱きながら迫る敵は、獲物が居たはずの場所にホロフィールドの破片だけが渦巻いているのを見て、立ち尽くすことになる。
fluff.ko: 자기 실력에 기고만장해 할리퀸에게 덤벼든 적 대부분이, 실체 없이 깜빡이는 홀로필드 조각 앞에서 망연자실하고 만다.
fluff.zh: 那些确信捕捉到丑角的敌人经常会发现目标原本的位置所剩下的只有扭动的全息景象碎片。

target.en: That <k>Harlequins</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ハーレクィン</k>・ユニット。

when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方<k>ハーレクィン</k>・ユニットを攻撃対象にした時。
