when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个敌方单位将一个己方<k>丑角</k>单位选为目标时。

effect.en:
When a model in your unit is destroyed, if your unit has not been selected to fight this phase, roll one D6:
  • On a 4+, do not remove that model from the battlefield. When your unit has fought, or at the end of the phase (whichever comes first), that model is removed from the battlefield.
effect.de:
Wenn ein Modell deiner Einheit zerstört wird und deine Einheit in dieser Phase noch nicht zum Kämpfen gewählt wurde, wirf einen W6:
  • Bei 4+ entferne jenes Modell nicht vom Schlachtfeld. Wenn deine Einheit gekämpft hat oder am Ende der Phase (was auch immer zuerst eintritt), wird jenes Modell vom Schlachtfeld entfernt.
effect.es:
Cuando una miniatura de tu unidad es eliminada, si tu unidad no se ha elegido para combatir en esta fase, tira 1D6:
  • Con 4+, no retires esa miniatura del campo de batalla en este momento; retírala después de que su unidad haya combatido o al final de la fase (lo que ocurra antes).
effect.fr:
Quand une figurine de votre unité est détruite, si votre unité n’a pas été choisie pour combattre à cette phase, jetez un D6 :
  • Sur 4+, ne retirez pas la figurine du champ de bataille. Une fois que votre unité a combattu, ou à la fin de la phase (selon ce qui advient en premier), la figurine est retirée du champ de bataille.
effect.it:
Quando un modello della tua unità viene distrutto, se la tua unità non è stata scelta per combattere in questa fase, tira un D6:
  • Con 4+ non rimuovere quel modello dal campo. Esso viene rimosso dopo che la tua unità ha combattuto, oppure alla fine della fase (ciò che avviene prima).
effect.ja:
その自軍のユニット内の兵が撃破された時、その自軍ユニットがこのフェイズ中にまだ白兵を宣言していない場合、D6を1個ロールする：
  • ロール結果が4+の場合、その兵を戦場から取り除かない。その自軍ユニットが白兵を行うか、そのフェイズ終了時のいずれかの条件が満たされた時点で、その兵を戦場から取り除く。
effect.ko:
이 유닛의 모델이 파괴될 때, 이번 페이즈에 이 유닛이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정되지 않았다면, D6를 하나 굴리고 다음을 적용합니다.
  • 값이 4+이면 그 모델은 전장에서 바로 제거되지 않습니다. 이 유닛이 백병전 수행을 종료한 다음, 또는 그 페이즈 종료 시(이 중 어느 하나라도 충족 시), 그 모델은 전장에서 제거됩니다.
effect.zh:
当您的单位中的模型被摧毁时，如果您的单位没有在该阶段中被选择进行近战，掷一枚 D6：
  • 如果掷骰结果为 4+，不要将那个模型从战场上移除。在您的单位完成近战后，或在阶段结束时（以先发生者为准），将那个模型从战场上移除。

fluff.en: Though they may be slain, this step of the saedath calls on the players to act out the demise of tragic heroes who take their enemies with them to death.
fluff.de: Auch wenn die Mimen getötet werden, verlangt dieser Schritt der Saedath von ihnen noch, das Ende eines tragischen Helden zu spielen, der seine Feinde mit sich in den Tod reißt.
fluff.es: Este paso del saedath obliga a los intérpretes a representar la muerte de héroes trágicos que se llevan consigo a los enemigos al morir.
fluff.fr: Bien que cela puisse être fatal, cette étape du saedath demande aux comédiens de recréer le décès de héros tragiques qui emportent leurs ennemis avec eux dans la mort.
fluff.it: Anche se può costare loro vita, questo passo della saedath richiede agli attori di inscenare la dipartita di eroi tragici che trascinano i nemici con sé tra le braccia della morte.
fluff.ja: たとえ死すとも、この演目の足取りを踏む演者たちは悲劇的英雄の死を演ずるなかで敵をも道連れにする。
fluff.ko: 비록 여기에서 생을 다할지라도, 세이다스 공연이 이 단계에 접어들면 배우들은 적과 동귀어진하는 비극적 영웅의 최후를 연기해야만 한다.
fluff.zh: 尽管在过程中死去，当前剧目的章节需要舞者表演悲剧英雄的陨落，与敌人同归于尽。

target.en: That <k>Harlequins Vehicle</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ハーレクィン・ビークル</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly <k>Harlequins Vehicle</k> unit has shot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, nachdem eine befreundete <k>Harlekin-Fahrzeug</k>-Einheit geschossen hat
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad <k>Vehículo Arlequines</k> amiga haya disparado.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité <k>Véhicule</k> des <k>Arlequins</k> amie a tiré.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, dopo che un’unità <k>Veicolo</k> degli <k>Arlecchini</k> amica ha tirato.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方<k>ハーレクィン・ビークル</k>・ユニットが射撃を行った時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 <k>할리퀸 기체</k> 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 己方射击阶段中，在一个己方<k>丑角载具</k>单位完成射击后。

effect.en:
• Your unit can make a normal move of up to D6".
  • Your unit is not eligible to declare a charge until the end of the turn.
effect.de:
• Deine Einheit kann eine normale Bewegung von bis zu W6" ausführen.
  • Deine Einheit kommt bis zum Ende des Zugs nicht infrage, einen ­Angriff anzusagen.
effect.es:
• Tu unidad puede hacer un movimiento normal de hasta 1D6".
  • Tu unidad no es apta para declarar cargas hasta el final del turno.
effect.fr:
• Votre unité peut faire un mouvement normal de D6" maximum.
  • Jusqu’à la fin du tour, votre unité n’est pas éligible pour déclarer une charge.
effect.it:
• La tua unità può effettuare un movimento normale di massimo D6".
  • La tua unità non è idonea a dichiarare una carica fino alla fine del turno.
effect.ja:
• その自軍ユニットは最大D6mvまで通常移動を行える。
  • そのターン終了時まで、その自軍ユニットは突撃を宣言できない。
effect.ko:
• 이 유닛은 최대 D6"의 일반 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
  • 이 유닛은 턴이 종료될 때까지 돌격 선언이 불가능합니다.
effect.zh:
• 您的单位可以进行一次最多 D6" 的常规移动。
  • 直到回合结束前，您的单位不能宣布冲锋。

fluff.en: The mirage launchers carried by a masque’s graceful craft can be triggered to produce haunting simulacra long enough to deceive the foe and allow a crew to manoeuvre away again to their next stage.
fluff.de: Die Trugbildwerfer der eleganten Gleiter des Maskenspiels können ausgelöst werden, um lang genug unheilvolle Sinnestäuschungen hervorzurufen, die den Feind täuschen und der Besatzung erlauben, sich in Richtung einer neuen Bühne zurückzuziehen.
fluff.es: Los lanzadores de espejismos que lleva la elegante nave pueden activarse para producir simulacros inquietantes el tiempo suficiente para engañar al enemigo y permitir que la tripulación maniobre.
fluff.fr: Les lanceurs Mirage de l’appareil gracieux d’un masque d’Arlequins peuvent produire un simulacre troublant assez longtemps pour tromper l’ennemi et laisser l’équipage manœuvrer jusqu’à la scène suivante.
fluff.it: I proiettori di miraggi montati sugli aggraziati veicoli di una maschera possono essere usati per dare vita a inquietanti simulacri che ingannano i nemici e consentono ai piloti di effettuare manovre evasive.
fluff.ja: マスクが乗る優美な機体にはミラージュ・ランチャーが搭載されている。これは敵を欺くのに十分な時間、恐るべき幻影を生み出すことができる。これにより乗員たちは戦闘を離脱し、次の舞台へと向かうことができる。
fluff.ko: 우아한 가면극단의 신기루 발사기는 정신을 앗아가는 모조물을 만들어낸다. 적이 여기에 정신이 팔린 동안 단원은 다음 무대로 자리를 옮긴다.
fluff.zh: 剧团中的载具所配备的魅影发射器能够制造出骇人的假象来迷惑敌人，让驾驶员有足够的时间转移前往下一个舞台。

target.en: That <k>Troupe</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>トルゥプ</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Fight phase, when a friendly Troupe unit is selected to fight.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Ensemble-Einheit zum Kämpfen gewählt wird
when.es: En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Compañía amiga se elige para combatir.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité de Troupe amie est choisie pour combattre.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità Troupe amica viene scelta per combattere.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、味方トルゥプ・ユニットが白兵を宣言した時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 아군 극단 유닛이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个己方剧团单位被选择进行近战时。

effect.en: Your unit’s melee attacks have <k>[lance]</k>.
effect.es: Los ataques de combate de tu unidad tienen <k>[Lanza]</k>.
effect.fr: Les attaques de mêlée de votre unité ont <k>[Lance]</k>.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da mischia della tua unità hanno <k>[Lancia]</k>.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの白兵攻撃は<k>［ランス］</k>を持つ。
effect.zh: 您的单位的近战攻击拥有<k>[骑枪]</k>。

fluff.en: Amongst the performances of a saedath is the climactic sundering of monstrous foes or the enemy’s hateful barques, acts the Harlequins have long mastered.
fluff.de: Zu den Aufführungen einer Saedath gehört auch die aufregende Zerstörung monströser Feinde oder der scheußlichen Maschinen der Antagonisten – eine Kunst, die von den Harlekinen lange gemeistert wurde.
fluff.es: Entre las actuaciones de un saedath se encuentra la destrucción culminante de monstruosos enemigos o de las odiosas naves enemigas, actos que los Arlequines dominan desde hace tiempo.
fluff.fr: Parmi les représentations d’un saedath, on trouve l’anéantissement d’ennemis monstrueux ou des atroces vaisseaux adverses, des actes que les Arlequins ont appris à maîtriser depuis bien longtemps.
fluff.it: Tra le performance di una saedath c’è la spettacolare eliminazione dei nemici mostruosi o degli orridi vascelli avversari, un’arte in cui gli Arlecchini sono maestri.
fluff.ja: 〈演目〉の演技の中には怪物のような敵や、憎むべき敵の船を破壊する場面がクライマックスとなっている場合がある。そのような技を披露できるのは、ハーレクィンが長年に渡り習熟してきた技によるものだ。
fluff.ko: 세이다스 공연 중에는 괴물같은 적이 극적으로 조각나거나 적대자의 증오 어린 단말마가 울린다. 이 모두 할리퀸이 오래 전에 통달한 기예이다.
fluff.zh: 在一个剧目的演出中，最为精彩的部分就是斩杀怪物或者可恨的敌舰，丑角早在很久以前就掌握了这样的表演。

target.en: One friendly <k>Troupe</k> unit.
target.ja: 味方の<k>トルゥプ</k>・ユニット1個。

when.en: End of your Movement phase.
when.es: Al final de tu fase de movimiento.
when.fr: À la fin de votre phase de Mouvement.
when.it: Alla fine della tua fase di Movimento.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ終了時。
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段结束时。

effect.en: Select one objective your unit is controlling. That objective is secured.
effect.de: Wähle ein von deiner Einheit kontrolliertes Missionsziel. Jenes Missionsziel ist gesichert.
effect.es: Elige 1 objetivo que tu unidad controle. Ese objetivo está asegurado.
effect.fr: Choisissez un objectif que votre unité contrôle. Cet objectif est sécurisé.
effect.it: Scegli un obiettivo controllato dalla tua unità. Quell’obiettivo è messo in sicurezza.
effect.ja: 自軍ユニットが確保している作戦目標1個を選択する。その作戦目標は安定化する。
effect.ko: 이 유닛이 장악한 목표물을 하나 지정합니다. 그 목표물은 확보 상태가 됩니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个您的单位控制的目标。那个目标被占领。

fluff.en: With the placement of sentinel nodes and a performance that echoes their guardianship of things lost to other Aeldari, the Harlequins guard well that which is sacred to them.
fluff.de: Indem sie Wachknoten platzieren und eine Aufführung beginnen, die ihre Wacht über Dinge darstellt, die für andere Aeldari längst verloren sind, schützen die Harlekine, was ihnen heilig ist.
fluff.es: Con la colocación de nodos centinela y una actuación que evoca su custodia de lo perdido por otros Aeldari, los Arlequines custodian con esmero lo que les es sagrado.
fluff.fr: Grâce à des modules sentinelles et en donnant une représentation qui évoque la conservation de ce que les autres Aeldari ont égaré, les vigilants Arlequins gardent ce qui leur est sacré.
fluff.it: Grazie al posizionamento di fulcri sentinella e una performance che mette in scena la protezione di ciò che gli altri Aeldari hanno perso, gli Arlecchini difendono ferocemente ciò che ritengono sacro.
fluff.ja: 哨戒ノードの配置と、他のアエルダリたちが失ったものの守護者としてその残響を演じることで、ハーレクィンはアエルダリの神聖なるものを守り続ける。
fluff.ko: 파수 지점의 적절한 설치. 다른 엘다리가 잊어버린 유산을 반영하는 신비한 공연. 이 모든 것을 통해 할리퀸은 거룩한 것을 지켜나간다.
fluff.zh: 通过设置哨兵节点，以及展现他们守护其他族人失去之物的表演，丑角们很好地守护着对他们而言神圣的东西。

target.en: That <k>Rangers/Shroud Runners</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>レンジャー/シュラウドランナー</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>游侠/帷幕奔行者</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly <k>Rangers/Shroud Runners</k> unit has shot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, nachdem eine befreundete <k>Welten­läufer</k>-<k>/Windläufer</k>-Einheit geschossen hat
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad <k>Exploradores/Cazadoras Sudario</k> amiga haya disparado.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de <k>Rangers/Coureurs Mirages</k> amie a tiré.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, dopo che un’unità di <k>Esploratori/Solcavelo</k> amica ha tirato.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方<k>レンジャー/シュラウドランナー</k>・ユニットが射撃を行った時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 <k>방랑자/장막 질주기</k> 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 己方射击阶段中，在一个己方<k>游侠/帷幕奔行者</k>完成射击后。

effect.en: Select one enemy unit hit by those ranged attacks. That enemy unit makes a battle‑shock roll, with ‑1 to that battle‑shock roll if a model in that enemy unit was destroyed by those attacks.
effect.de: Wähle eine feindliche Einheit, die von mindestens einer jener Fernkapfattacken getroffen wurde. Jene feindliche Einheit führt einen Erschütterungs­wurf mit -1 aus, falls ein Modell jener feindlichen Einheit durch jene Attacken zerstört wurde.
effect.es: Elige 1 unidad enemiga en la que haya impactado alguno de esos ataques. Esa unidad enemiga hace una tirada de acobardamiento, con un -1 esa tirada si alguna miniatura de esa unidad enemiga fue eliminada por esos ataques.
effect.fr: Choisissez une unité ennemie touchée par ces attaques de tir. L’unité ennemie fait un jet d’ébranlement, avec ‑1 à ce jet si une ou plusieurs figurines de cette unité ennemie ont été détruites par ces attaques.
effect.it: Scegli un’unità nemica colpita da quegli attacchi da tiro. Quell’unità nemica effettua un tiro per i traumi con -1 a quel tiro per i traumi se un suo modello è stato distrutto da quegli attacchi.
effect.ja: それらの射撃攻撃がヒットした敵ユニットを1個選択する。選択された敵ユニットは戦闘ショックロールを行う。その敵ユニット内の兵が、それらの攻撃で撃破されていた場合、その戦闘ショックロールは-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 그 원거리 공격이 명중한 적 유닛 하나를 지정합니다. 그 적 유닛은 전투충격 굴림을 수행합니다. 그 적 유닛의 모델이 그 공격으로 파괴되었다면 그 전투충격 굴림에 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个被那些远程攻击命中的敌方单位。那个敌方单位进行一次战斗震慑掷骰，如果那个敌方单位中有模型被那些攻击摧毁，那么战斗震慑掷骰 -1。

fluff.en: Struck by a sudden volley of precision shots when no foe can be pinpointed can shake the resolve of the most stoic warriors.
fluff.de: Von einer plötzlichen Salve aus Präzisionsbeschuss getroffen zu werden, ohne dass ein Feind zu sehen ist, kann die Entschlossenheit der stoischsten Krieger erschüttern.
fluff.es: Ser alcanzado por una repentina ráfaga de disparos precisos cuando no se puede localizar al enemigo puede quebrantar la determinación de los guerreros más estoicos.
fluff.fr: Être touché par des tirs précis sans qu’aucun ennemi ne soit visible peut ébranler les combattants les plus imperturbables.
fluff.it: Mettere a segno una salva di colpi improvvisa quando i nemici non riescono a ricambiare può minare la determinazione anche dei guerrieri più stoici.
fluff.ja: 敵の所在も特定できないまま、密射撃の斉射を突然に浴びせられたなら、いかに剛毅な戦士であろうと心を乱されるであろう。
fluff.ko: 가장 초연한 전사라고 할지라도 알 수 없는 곳에서 정밀한 일제사격이 갑작스레 날아들면 동요하기 마련이다.
fluff.zh: 遭到突如其来的精准射击且无法定位敌人，最为坚毅的勇士也会开始动摇。

target.en: That <k>Rangers/Shroud Runners</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>レンジャー/シュラウドランナー</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>游侠/帷幕奔行者</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly <k>Rangers/Shroud Runners</k> unit has shot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, nachdem eine befreundete <k>Welten­läufer</k>-<k>/Windläufer</k>-Einheit geschossen hat
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad <k>Exploradores/Cazadoras Sudario</k> amiga haya disparado.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de <k>Rangers/Coureurs Mirages</k> amie a tiré.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, dopo che un’unità di <k>Esploratori/Solcavelo</k> amica ha tirato.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方<k>レンジャー/シュラウドランナー</k>・ユニットが射撃を行った時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 <k>방랑자/장막 질주기</k> 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 己方射击阶段中，在一个己方<k>游侠/帷幕奔行者</k>完成射击后。

effect.en: Select one enemy unit hit by those ranged attacks. That enemy unit has +6" detection range.
effect.de: Wähle eine von mindestens einer jener Fernkampfattacken getroffene feindliche Einheit. Jene feindliche Einheit hat +6" Entdeckungsreichweite.
effect.es: Elige 1 unidad enemiga en la que haya impactado alguno de esos ataques a distancia. Esa unidad enemiga tiene +6" al alcance de detección.
effect.fr: Choisissez une unité ennemie touchée par ces attaques de tir. L’unité ennemie a +6" en portée de détection.
effect.it: Scegli un’unità nemica colpita da quegli attacchi da tiro. Quell’unità nemica ha +6" alla distanza di individuazione.
effect.ja: それらの射撃攻撃がヒットした敵ユニットを1個選択する。選択された敵ユニットの発見範囲は+6mvの修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 그 원거리 공격이 명중한 적 유닛 하나를 지정합니다. 그 적 유닛에 발각 범위 +6"를 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个被那些远程攻击命中的敌方单位。那个敌方单位的侦测范围 +6"。

fluff.en: Once these snipers have found their range to a shrouded foe with marksmen’s instincts and esoteric targeting technology, they swiftly pass this knowledge onto their allies.
fluff.de: Wenn diese Scharfschützen erst mit den Instinkten eines Jägers und ihren überragenden Zielvisieren ihre versteckte Beute ausfindig gemacht haben, geben sie dieses Wissen schnell an ihre Verbündeten weiter.
fluff.es: Cuando estos francotiradores detectan a un enemigo oculto, con instintos de tirador y tecnología de puntería esotérica, transmiten rápidamente este conocimiento a sus aliados.
fluff.fr: Grâce à leur instinct et une technologie de ciblage ésotérique, une fois que ces tireurs d'élite sont à portée d'un ennemi dissimulé, ils transmettent ces données à leurs alliés.
fluff.it: Non appena questi cecchini scovano un nemico nascosto grazie a istinto venatorio e tecnologie di puntamento esoteriche, comunicano subito le informazioni agli alleati.
fluff.ja: これらの狙撃手は、射手の本能と秘奥の照準技術を駆使し、身を隠す敵への距離を掴むと、その情報を迅速に味方へ共有する。
fluff.ko: 명사수의 본능과 기묘한 조준 기술을 통해 숨은 적을 찾아낸 이 저격수들은 동료들에게 신속하게 정보를 전달한다.
fluff.zh: 一旦这些狙击手凭借其神射手的本能与秘传的瞄准技术测定出了隐匿敌人的距离，他们便会迅速将这一情报传递给盟友。

target.en: That <k>Rangers/Shroud Runners</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>レンジャー/シュラウドランナー</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>游侠/帷幕奔行者</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly <k>Rangers/Shroud Runners</k> unit has shot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, nachdem eine befreundete <k>Welten­läufer</k>-<k>/Windläufer</k>-Einheit geschossen hat
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad <k>Exploradores/Cazadoras Sudario</k> amiga haya disparado.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de <k>Rangers/Coureurs Mirages</k> amie a tiré.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, dopo che un’unità di <k>Esploratori/Solcavelo</k> amica ha tirato.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方<k>レンジャー/シュラウドランナー</k>・ユニットが射撃を行った時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 <k>방랑자/장막 질주기</k> 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 己方射击阶段中，在一个己方<k>游侠/帷幕奔行者</k>完成射击后。

effect.en:
• Your unit can make a normal move of up to D6".
  • Your unit is not eligible to declare a charge or embark within a Transport until the end of the turn.
effect.de:
• Deine Einheit kann eine normale Bewegung von bis zu W6" ausführen.
  • Deine Einheit kommt bis zum Ende des Zugs nicht infrage, einen Angriff anzusagen oder in einen Transporter einzusteigen.
effect.es:
• Tu unidad puede hacer un movimiento normal de hasta 1D6".
  • Tu unidad no es apta para declarar cargas o embarcar en un Transporte hasta el final del turno.
effect.fr:
• Votre unité peut faire un mouvement normal de D6" maximum.
  • Jusqu’à la fin du tour, votre unité n’est pas éligible pour déclarer une charge ou embarquer dans un Transport.
effect.it:
• La tua unità può effettuare un movimento normale di massimo D6".
  • La tua unità non è idonea a dichiarare una carica né a imbarcarsi in un Trasporto fino alla fine del turno.
effect.ja:
• その自軍ユニットは最大D6mvまで通常移動を行える。
  • そのターンの終了時まで、その自軍ユニットは突撃を宣言または兵員輸送への乗車はできない。
effect.ko:
• 이 유닛은 최대 D6"의 일반 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
  • 이 유닛은 턴이 종료될 때까지 돌격 선언 또는 수송 모델에 탑승이 불가능합니다.
effect.zh:
• 您的单位可以进行一次最多 D6" 的常规移动。
  • 您的单位在该回合结束前不能宣布冲锋或搭乘运输工具。

fluff.en: The unconstrained nomadism of a craftworld’s outcasts extends to the battlefield, such that few foes can respond before they melt back into hiding to hunt elsewhere.
fluff.de: Das keinen Grenzen unterworfene Nomadendasein der Ausgestoßenen der Weltenschiffe gilt auch auf dem Schlachtfeld, sodass nur wenige Feinde reagieren können, ehe sie in den Schatten verschwinden und andernorts zuschlagen.
fluff.es: Centrada en cumplir su imperativo asignado, esta imponente bioforma aplasta a sus presas con oleadas de poder adicional impulsadas por la alegría.
fluff.fr: Le nomadisme sans contrainte des errants d'un vaisseau-monde s'étend sur le champ de bataille. Rares sont les ennemis capables de riposter avant qu'ils se fondent dans l'environnement en quête d'une nouvelle cible.
fluff.it: Il nomadismo dei reietti di un arcamondo si estende anche al campo di battaglia, al punto che pochi nemici riescono a reagire prima che svaniscano per andare a caccia altrove.
fluff.ja: 〈方舟〉の出奔者たちの束縛なき遊動性は、戦場でも同様に発揮される。敵に反撃の機会を与えぬうちに姿を消し、別の獲物を求めて狩りを再開するのだ。
fluff.ko: 크래프트월드의 방랑자가 걷는 자유로운 유목 생활은 심지어 전장에서도 이어진다. 이들이 새 사냥감을 찾아 사라져버리기 전에 제대로 대응할 수 있는 적은 거의 없다.
fluff.zh: 方舟世界流放者们在战场上也会进行无拘的漂泊，很少有敌人在他们消失之前能够做出反应。

target.en: That <k>Aeldari Vehicle</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>アエルダリ・ビークル</k>・ユニット
target.zh: 那个<k>艾达灵族载具</k>单位。

when.en: Any phase, when a friendly Aeldari Vehicle unit suffers a mortal wound.
when.de: Eine beliebige Phase, wenn eine Aeldari-Fahrzeug-Einheit eine tödliche Verwundung erleidet
when.es: En cualquier fase, cuando una unidad Vehículo Aeldari amiga sufre una herida mortal.
when.fr: À n’importe quelle phase, quand une unité de Véhicule Aeldari amie subit une blessure mortelle.
when.it: In qualsiasi fase, quando un’unità Veicolo degli Aeldari amica subisce una ferita mortale.
when.ja: いずれかのフェイズ中、味方アエルダリ・ビークル・ユニットが致命的ダメージを受けた時。
when.ko: 어느 페이즈든, 아군 엘다리 기체 유닛이 치명상을 입을 때.
when.zh: 任意阶段中，在一个己方艾达灵族载具单位受到一处致命伤时。

effect.en: Your unit has Feel No Pain 5+ against mortal wounds.
effect.de: Deine Einheit hat Verletzungen ignorieren 5+ gegen tödliche Verwundungen.
effect.es: Tu unidad tiene No hay dolor 5+ contra heridas mortales.
effect.fr: Votre unité a Insensible à la Douleur 5+ contre les blessures mortelles.
effect.it: La tua unità ha Insensibile al Dolore 5+ contro le ferite mortali.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは致命的ダメージに対する『痛みを知らぬ者5+』を持つ。
effect.zh: 目标单位针对致命伤拥有不觉疼痛 5+。

fluff.en: The wraithbone superstructure of this vehicle has been interlaced with warding runes, enabling its hull to resist incoming fire.
fluff.de: Die Phantomkristallstruktur dieses Fahrzeug ist mit Schutzrunen versehen worden, sodass sein Rumpf eingehendem Feindfeuer widersteht.
fluff.es: La superestructura de hueso espectral de este vehículo tiene runas de protección grabadas, lo que le permite resistir aún más disparos.
fluff.fr: La superstructure de moelle spectrale de ce véhicule a été entrelacée de runes de protection, pour permettre à sa coque de résister aux tirs adverses.
fluff.it: La sovrastruttura di spettrosso di questo veicolo, soffusa di rune protettive, permette allo scafo di resistere ai proiettili in arrivo.
fluff.ja: この機体の幽骨構造には、敵の砲撃から身を守るための守護のルーンが組み込まれている。
fluff.ko: 이 기체의 혼령뼈 상부구조에는 수호 룬이 엮여 있어 적 사격으로부터 차체를 보호한다.
fluff.zh: 这个载具的灵骨结构中交织了守护符文，让它的外壳能够抵御猛烈的攻击。

target.en: That <k>Aeldari Vehicle</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>アエルダリ・ビークル</k>・ユニット
target.zh: 那个<k>艾达灵族载具</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Aeldari Vehicle unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Aeldari-Fahrzeug-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Vehículo Aeldari amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de Véhicule Aeldari amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità Veicolo degli Aeldari amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方アエルダリ・ビークル・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 엘다리 기체 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方艾达灵族载具单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en:
Your unit’s attacks can re‑roll:
  • One hit roll.
  • One wound roll.
  • One damage roll.
effect.de:
Für Attacken deiner Einheit kann:
  • ein einzelner Trefferwurf wiederholt werden.
  • ein einzelner Verwundungswurf wiederholt werden.
  • ein einzelner Schadenswurf wiederholt werden.
effect.es:
En los ataques de tu unidad se puede repetir:
  • 1 tirada para impactar.
  • 1 tirada para herir.
  • 1 tirada de daño.
effect.fr:
Les attaques de votre unité peuvent relancer :
  • Un jet de touche.
  • Un jet de blessure.
  • Un jet de dégâts.
effect.it:
Gli attacchi della tua unità possono ripetere:
  • Un singolo tiro per colpire.
  • Un singolo tiro per ferire.
  • Un singolo tiro per i danni.
effect.ja:
その自軍ユニットの攻撃は以下をリロールできる：
  • ヒットロールの1つ。
  • ウーンズロールの1つ。
  • ダメージ量判定ロールの1つ。
effect.ko:
이 유닛의 공격은 다음 굴림을 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
  • 명중 굴림 하나.
  • 타격 굴림 하나.
  • 피해 굴림 하나.
effect.zh:
您的单位的攻击可以重掷：
  • 一颗命中掷骰。
  • 一颗致伤掷骰。
  • 一颗伤害掷骰。

fluff.en: Spirit stones containing the souls of gifted seers have been embedded into this vehicle’s targeting matrices. The essences within lend guidance even in death.
fluff.de: Seelensteine, die die Geister fähiger Seher enthalten, wurden in die Zielmatrizen dieses Fahrzeugs eingebettet. Selbst im Tod führen sie ihr Volk.
fluff.es: Las matrices de puntería de este vehículo muestran joyas espirituales que contienen las almas de videntes cuyas esencias sirven de guía incluso en la muerte.
fluff.fr: Des pierres-esprits abritant les âmes de prescients illustres ont été intégrées aux matrices de visée de ce véhicule. Les essences qu’elles contiennent offrent leur aide même dans la mort.
fluff.it: Nelle matrici di puntamento di questo veicolo sono incastonate pietre dello spirito contenenti le anime di importanti veggenti, che fanno da guida anche dall’aldilà.
fluff.ja: この車両の照準マトリックスには、優れた先見司の魂を宿した魂魄石が組み込まれている。先見司の精髄は死してなお同胞たちを勝利に導く。
fluff.ko: 이 기체의 조준 매트릭스에 삽입된 혼백석에는 뛰어난 선견가의 영혼이 깃들어 있다. 그 혼은 죽음을 넘어서까지 동족의 전쟁을 이끈다.
fluff.zh: 包含卓越先知灵魂的灵魂石被镶入了这个载具的瞄准系统当中。就算已经死去，他们依旧能够提供指引。

target.en: That <k>Aeldari Vehicle</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>アエルダリ・ビークル</k>・ユニット
target.zh: 那个<k>艾达灵族载具</k>单位。

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Aeldari Vehicle unit makes a fall‑back move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine befreundete Aeldari-Fahrzeug-Einheit eine Rückzugsbewegung ausführt
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento, cuando una unidad Vehículo Aeldari amiga hace un movimiento de retroceder.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité de Véhicule Aeldari amie fait un mouvement de retraite.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità Veicolo degli Aeldari amica effettua un movimento di ripiegamento.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方アエルダリ・ビークル・ユニットが退却移動を行った時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 엘다리 기체 유닛이 후퇴 이동을 수행할 때.
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段中，当一个己方艾达灵族载具单位被选择进行一次后撤移动时。

effect.en: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot.
effect.de: Jene Bewegung verhindert nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, zu schießen.
effect.es: Ese movimiento no impide a tu unidad ser apta para disparar.
effect.fr: Ce mouvement n’empêche pas votre unité d’être éligible pour tirer.
effect.it: Quel movimento non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a tirare.
effect.ja: その移動を行った自軍ユニットは射撃を宣言できる。
effect.ko: 그 이동에도 불구하고 이 유닛은 사격이 가능합니다.
effect.zh: 那次移动不会阻止您的单位进行射击。

fluff.en: The result of exquisite and ingenious Aeldari engineering, vectored engines enable grav vehicles to evade their enemies while maintaining accurate fire.
fluff.de: Vektorschubdüsen sind das Ergebnis genialer Aeldari-Handwerkskunst und ermöglichen Antigravfahrzeugen, ihren Feinden auszuweichen und gleichzeitig das Feuer aufrechtzuerhalten.
fluff.es: Fruto de la exquisita ingeniería aeldari, los motores vectoriales permiten a los vehículos gravitatorios evadir al enemigo sin dejar de disparar con precisión.
fluff.fr:
Résultat de l’ingénierie raffinée des Aeldari, les
moteurs vectoriels permettent aux véhicules
antigrav d’échapper à leurs ennemis tout en
exécutant des tirs précis.
fluff.it: Capolavoro della straordinaria ingegneria aeldari, i motori vettoriali consentono ai veicoli antigravità di evitare i nemici pur scatenando raffiche precise.
fluff.ja: 卓越した機能と精密性を誇るアエルダリのテクノロジー。その産物であるヴェクターエンジンは、反重力駆動の戦闘車両が難なく敵を回避し、正確に砲撃することを可能にしている。
fluff.ko: 정교하고 독창적인 엘다리 공학의 산물인 추력편향 기관 덕분에 중력 기체는 적 공격을 회피하는 동시에 정밀한 사격을 지속할 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 矢量引擎是艾达灵族巧妙与智慧的工艺产物，让反重力载具能够在回避敌人的同时保持精准的射击。

name.ja: 隠密狙撃手（アップグレード）

description.en: Rangers unit only. This unit’s ranged attacks do not prevent this unit from being hidden.
description.de: Nur für eine Weltenläufer-Einheit. Fernkampfattacken dieser Einheit verhindern nicht, dass diese Einheit versteckt ist.
description.es: Solo unidad Exploradores. Los ataques a distancia de esta unidad no le impiden estar oculta.
description.fr: Unité de Rangers seulement. Les attaques de tir de cette unité ne l’empêchent pas d’être cachée.
description.it: Solo unità di Esploratori. Gli attacchi da tiro di questa unità non impediscono a questa unità di essere nascosta.
description.ja: レンジャー・ユニットのみ。このユニットの射撃攻撃は、このユニットの隠密状態を解除しない。
description.ko: 방랑자 유닛 전용. 이 유닛은 원거리 공격 수행에도 불구하고 은폐 상태를 유지합니다.
description.zh: 仅限游侠单位。该单位的远程攻击阻止该单位隐藏。

description.en: Troupe Master model only. This unit can re‑roll charge rolls.
description.de: Nur für ein Meistermime-Modell. Für diese Einheit können Angriffs­würfe wiederholt werden.
description.es: Solo miniatura Director de Compañía. Esta unidad puede repetir las tiradas de carga.
description.fr: Figurine de Coryphée seulement. Cette unité peut relancer les jets de charge.
description.it: Solo modelli di Capo Troupe. Questa unità può ripetere i tiri per caricare.
description.ja: トルゥプマスター・兵のみ。このユニットは突撃ロールをリロールできる。
description.ko: 극단장 모델 전용. 이 유닛은 돌격 굴림을 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
description.zh: 仅限剧团长模型。该单位可以重掷冲锋掷骰。

name.ja: 落影の仮面（アップグレード）

description.en: Troupe unit only. This unit has Fights First.
description.de: Nur für eine Ensemble-Einheit. Diese Einheit hat Erstschlag.
description.es: Solo unidad Compañía. Esta unidad tiene Combatir primero.
description.fr: Unité de Troupe seulement. Cette unité a Combat en Premier.
description.it: Solo unità Troupe. Questa unità ha Combatte per Prima.
description.ja: トゥルプ・ユニットのみ。このユニットは『先手』を持つ。
description.zh: 仅限剧团单位。该单位拥有先攻。

name.ja: 暗殺者の眼（アップグレード）

description.en: Rangers/Shroud Runners unit only. This unit’s ranged attacks that target a CHARACTER unit have +1 AP.
description.de: Nur für eine Weltenläufer-/Windläufer-Einheit. Fernkampfattacken dieser Einheit gegen eine Charaktermodell-Einheit haben +1 DS.
description.es: Solo unidad Exploradores/Cazadoras Sudario. Los ataques a distancia de esta unidad que tomen como blanco una unidad PERSONAJE tienen +1 a FP.
description.fr: Unité de Rangers/Coureurs Mirages seulement. Les attaques de tir de cette unité qui ciblent une unité de Personnage ont +1 en PA.
description.it: Solo unità di Esploratori/Solcavelo. Gli attacchi da tiro di questa unità che hanno come bersaglio un’unità Personaggio hanno +1 VP.
description.ja: レンジャー/シュラウドランナー・ユニットのみ。このユニットの射撃攻撃がキャラクターを対象としている場合、その攻撃の【貫】は+1の修正を受ける。
description.ko: 방랑자/장막 질주기 유닛 전용. 이 유닛의 원거리 공격이 캐릭터 유닛을 대상으로 지정한다면, 그 공격에 관통 +1을 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限游侠/帷幕奔行者单位。该单位针对角色单位进行的远程攻击拥有 +1 AP。

description.en: Shadowseer model only. This unit has Infiltrators.
description.de: Nur für ein Schicksalsleser-Modell. Diese Einheit hat Infiltratoren.
description.es: Solo miniatura Vidente de Sombras. Esta unidad tiene Infiltradores.
description.fr: Figurine de Prophète de l’Ombre seulement. Cette unité a Infiltrateurs.
description.it: Solo modelli di Veggente Ombra. Questa unità ha Infiltratori.
description.ja: シャドウシーア・兵のみ。このユニットは浸透戦術を持つ。
description.zh: 仅限阴影先知模型。该单位拥有渗透者技能。

description.en: Harlequins model only. This unit has Scouts 6".
description.de: Nur für ein Harlekin-Modell. Diese Einheit hat Kundschafter 6".
description.fr: Figurine d’Arlequin seulement. Cette unité a Éclaireurs 6".
description.it: Solo modelli degli Arlecchini. Questa unità ha Esploratori 6".
description.ja: ハーレクィン・兵のみ。このユニットは『斥候6mv』を持つ。
description.zh: 仅限丑角模型。该单位拥有斥候 6" 技能。

description.en:
Aeldari Psyker model only.
  • While this model is within 3" of a friendly Aeldari Vehicle unit, this model has Lone Operative.
  • In your Movement phase, at the start or end of this unit’s move, you can select one friendly Aeldari Vehicle model within 3" of this model. That Vehicle model heals D3 wounds.
description.de:
Nur für ein Aeldari-Psioniker-Modell.
  • Solange sich dieses Modell innerhalb von 3" um eine befreundete Aeldari-Fahrzeug-Einheit befindet, hat dieses Modell Einsamer Wolf.
  • In deiner Bewegungsphase kannst du zu Beginn oder am Ende der Bewegung dieser Einheit ein befreundetes Aeldari-Fahrzeug-Modell innerhalb von 3" um dieses Modell wählen. Jenes Fahrzeug-Modell wird um bis zu W3 Lebenspunkte geheilt.
description.es:
Solo miniatura Psíquico Aeldari.
  • Mientras esta miniatura esté a 3" o menos de alguna unidad Vehículo Aeldari amiga, esta miniatura tiene Agente solitario.
  • En tu fase de movimiento, al inicio o al final del movimiento de esta unidad, puedes elegir 1 miniatura Vehículo Aeldari amiga a 3" o menos de esta miniatura. Esa miniatura Vehículo se cura 1D3 heridas.
description.fr:
Figurine de Psyker Aeldari seulement.
  • Tant que cette figurine est à 3" ou moins d’une unité de Véhicule Aeldari amie, elle a Agent Solitaire.
  • À votre phase de Mouvement, au début ou à la fin du mouvement de cette unité, vous pouvez choisir une figurine de Véhicule Aeldari amie à 3" ou moins de cette figurine. Cette figurine de Véhicule amie soigne D3 PV.
description.it:
Solo modelli Psionici degli Aeldari.
  • Fintanto che si trova entro 3" da un’unità Veicolo degli Aeldari amica, questo modello ha Agente Solitario.
  • Nella tua fase di Movimento, all’inizio o alla fine del movimento di questa unità, puoi scegliere un modello di Veicolo degli Aeldari amico entro 3" da questo modello. Quel modello di Veicolo guarisce D3 ferite.
description.ja:
アエルダリ・サイカー・兵のみ。
  • この兵が味方アエルダリ・ビークル・ユニットの3mv以内に一部でも入っている間、この兵は『単独工作員』を持つ。
  • 自軍側移動フェイズ中、このユニットの移動開始時あるいは終了時、この兵の3mv以内に一部でも入っている味方アエルダリ・ビークル・兵を1体選択できる。選択されたビークル・兵は【負傷限界】をD3ポイント回復する。
description.ko:
엘다리 사이커 모델 전용.
  • 이 모델이 아군 엘다리 기체 유닛의 3" 내에 있는 동안, 이 모델에 단독 요원을 부여합니다.
  • 플레이어의 이동 페이즈에, 이 유닛의 이동 시작 또는 종료 시, 이 모델의 3" 내에 있는 아군 엘다리 기체 모델 하나를 지정할 수 있습니다. 그 기체 모델이 체력을 D3만큼 회복합니다.
description.zh:
仅限艾达灵族灵能者模型。
  • 在该模型位于己方艾达灵族载具单位的 3" 时，该模型拥有独行特工技能。
  • 在己方移动阶段中，在该单位开始或结束一次移动时，您可以选择一个位于其 3" 内的己方艾达灵族载具模型。那个载具模型治疗 D3 处耐伤。

description.en: Aeldari Psyker model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one visible friendly Aeldari Vehicle unit within 6" of this model. That Vehicle unit’s ranged attacks have +1 to hit rolls.
description.de: Nur für ein Aeldari-Psioniker-Modell. Wähle zu Beginn deiner Fernkampfphase eine für dieses Modell sichtbare befreundete Aeldari-Fahrzeug-Einheit innerhalb von 6". Die Fernkampfattacken jener Fahrzeug-Einheit haben +1 auf Trefferwürfe.
description.es: Solo miniatura Psíquico Aeldari. Al inicio de tu fase de disparo, elige 1 unidad Vehículo Aeldari amiga visible y a 6" o menos de esta miniatura. Los ataques a distancia de esa unidad Vehículo tienen +1 a las tiradas para impactar.
description.fr: Figurine de Psyker Aeldari seulement. Au début de votre phase de Tir, choisissez une unité de Véhicule Aeldari amie visible et à 6" ou moins de cette figurine. Les attaques de tir de l’unité de Véhicule choisie ont +1 aux jets de touche.
description.it: Solo modelli di Psionici degli Aeldari. All’inizio della tua fase di Tiro scegli un’unità Veicolo degli Aeldari amica visibile entro 6" da questo modello. Gli attacchi da tiro di quell’unità Veicolo hanno +1 ai tiri per colpire.
description.ja: アエルダリ・サイカー・兵のみ。自軍側射撃フェイズ開始時、この兵の6mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認可能な味方アエルダリ・ビークル・ユニットを1個選択する。選択されたビークル・ユニットの射撃攻撃はヒットロールに+1の修正を受ける。
description.ko: 엘다리 사이커 모델 전용. 플레이어의 사격 페이즈 시작 시, 이 모델의 시야에 들어오며 6" 내에 있는 아군 엘다리 기체 유닛 하나를 지정합니다. 그 기체 유닛의 원거리 공격에 명중 굴림 +1을 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限艾达灵族灵能者模型。在己方射击阶段开始时，选择一个位于该模型 6" 内且对其可见的己方艾达灵族载具单位。那个载具单位远程攻击的命中掷骰结果 +1。

description.en: **ASURYANI MOUNTED** model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 9" ability.

**ASURYANI** model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, remove it from play, then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.
**ASURYANI MOUNTED** model only. Each time an attack targets the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
**ASURYANI MOUNTED PSYKER** model only. Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer have the **[ANTI‑MONSTER 2+]** and **[ANTI‑VEHICLE 2+]** abilities.

**ASURYANI MOUNTED** model only. In your Command phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is not within your deployment zone, and adding an additional 1 to the result if the bearer is within your opponent’s deployment zone: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

**SPIRITSEER** model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly **WRAITH CONSTRUCT** unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of **INFANTRY** models in that unit and add 3 to the Objective Control characteristic of **MONSTER** models in that unit.

**SPIRITSEER** model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly **WRAITH CONSTRUCT** unit within 12" of the bearer (excluding **TITANIC** units). Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, that attack has the **[PRECISION]** ability.

**SPIRITSEER** model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly **WRAITH CONSTRUCT** unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, unless the attacking model is within 18", models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

**SPIRITSEER** model only. In your opponent's Movement phase, if an enemy unit ends a move within 8” of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this unit can make a Normal move of up to 6”.

**TROUPE MASTER** model only. Each time the bearer’s unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit, then roll one D6 for each model in the bearer’s unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

**HARLEQUINS** model only. Each time an enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle‑shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.
**DEATH JESTER** model only. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets a unit that is Below Half‑strength, each successful Hit roll scores a Critical Hit.
**SHADOWSEER** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators ability.

**ASURYANI** model only. At the start of the battle round, if the bearer is on the battlefield (or any **TRANSPORT** it is embarked within is on the battlefield), you receive 1 additional Battle Focus token.
**ASURYANI** model only. Once per battle round, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Command Re‑roll Stratagem for 0CP.
**ASURYANI PSYKER** model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.
**ASURYANI** model only. The bearer has an Objective Control characteristic of 5.
**ASURYANI** model only. In the Deploy Armies step, select up to two **GUARDIANS** units from your army. Models in the selected units have the Infiltrators ability.

**ASURYANI** model only. While the bearer is leading a **DIRE AVENGERS** or **GUARDIANS** unit, once per battle round, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+, or unmodified Hit rolls of 4+ instead if the bearer’s unit is within range of an objective marker you control.

**ASURYANI** model only. While the bearer is leading a **STORM GUARDIANS** unit, each time you roll to determine the number of attacks made with a flamer equipped by a model in that unit, you can re‑roll the result, and each time you make a Damage roll for a model equipped with a fusion gun in that unit, you can re‑roll the result.
**FARSEER** model only. The bearer’s Eldritch Storm weapon has the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.
**WARLOCK** model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle‑shock test.
**ARCHON** model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.
**SUCCUBUS** model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, you can re‑roll the Wound roll.
**ASURYANI PSYKER** model only. In your Command phase, you can add 1 to or subtract 1 from the value of one Fate dice in your Fate dice pool.

**ASURYANI PSYKER** model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds, Psychic Attacks and Critical Wounds caused by attacks with the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.
**ASURYANI PSYKER** model only. Add 12" to the Range characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

**ASURYANI PSYKER** model only. Once per turn, when your opponent targets a unit from their army within 12" of the bearer with a Stratagem, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, increase the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.
**AUTARCH** or **AUTARCH WAYLEAPER** model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer, and those weapons have the **[PRECISION]** ability.

**AUTARCH** or **AUTARCH WAYLEAPER** model only. While the bearer is leading an **ASPECT WARRIORS** unit, each time that unit is selected to shoot or fight, until the end of the phase, models in that unit gain both of the abilities from the Path of the Warrior Detachment rule.
**AUTARCH** or **AUTARCH WAYLEAPER** model only. While the bearer is leading an **ASPECT WARRIORS** unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
**AUTARCH** or **AUTARCH WAYLEAPER** model only. While the bearer is leading an **ASPECT WARRIORS** unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.
**HARLEQUINS** model only (excluding **SOLITAIRE** models). Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.
**TROUPE MASTER** model only. Add 3 to the Strength and add 1 to the Attacks characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons.
**DEATH JESTER** model only. When using the bearer’s Cruel Amusement ability, you can select two of the abilities for its shrieker cannon to gain, instead of one.

**SHADOWSEER** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **HARLEQUINS** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.
**PRINCE YRIEL** unit only. Each time you spend a Battle Focus token to enable this unit to perform an Agile Manoeuvre, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1 Battle Focus token.
**ANHRATHE** unit only. Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[LANCE]** ability.
**ANHRATHE** unit only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[ANTI‑MONSTER 5+]** and **[ANTI‑VEHICLE 5+]** abilities.

**ANHRATHE INFANTRY** unit only. This unit can perform the Fade Back Agile Manoeuvre without spending a Battle Focus token to do so. It can do so even if other units have done so in the same phase, and doing so does not prevent other units from performing the same Agile Manoeuvre in the same phase.
**ANHRATHE** unit only. While an enemy unit is within 3" of this unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit (to a minimum of 1).

**ANHRATHE** unit only. Models in this unit have the Deep Strike ability. In addition, once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can use this ability. If it does, remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

**ANHRATHE CHARACTER** unit only. At the start of the battle, select one **CHARACTER** model in this unit. That model has the following ability:

**Lord of Deceit (Aura):** Once per turn, when your opponent targets a unit from their army within 12” of this model with a stratagem, you can use this ability. If you do, increase the CP cost of that use of that stratagem by 1CP.
**ANHRATHE INFANTRY** unit only. Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

While this model is leading a unit, in your Shooting phase, after that unit has shot, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

Once per battle, when this model is selected to shoot, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, its Bloody Twins weapon has a Damage characteristic of 3 and the **[ANTI‐INFANTRY 5+]** and **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** abilities.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Bloody Twins; Sword of Asur.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Asurmen’s skill at war is breathtaking, the magnitude of his heroic presence so great that nearby Aspect Warriors are infused with his peerless tactical acumen. In addition to the wrist‐mounted shuriken catapults known as the Bloody Twins, he carries the Sword of Asur, whose hilt bears the spirit stone of Asurmen’s brother, Tethesis.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **DIRE AVENGERS**

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, you can re‐roll Advance rolls made for that unit, and you can re‐roll any rolls made for that unit while it is performing an Agile Manoeuvre.
Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

■ While this model is leading a **HOWLING BANSHEES** unit, it has the Fights First ability.
■ While this model is leading a **STRIKING SCORPIONS** unit, it has the Infiltrators, Scouts 7" and Stealth abilities.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** shuriken pistol; star glaive.

wargear.en: This model’s star glaive can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 Banshee blade ◦ 1 Scorpion chainsword
This model’s shuriken pistol can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 death spinner ◦ 1 Dragon fusion gun ◦ 1 Dragon fusion pistol ◦ 1 Reaper launcher

fluff.en: Autarchs are legendary for their strategic brilliance, sublime martial skill and indomitable strength of will. Long have they trodden the Path of the Warrior, never slipping into the obsession trap. Instead, they apply all they have learned and mastered to their command of the Asuryani warhosts.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **DARK REAPERS** ■ **DIRE AVENGERS** ■ **FIRE DRAGONS** ■ **GUARDIAN DEFENDERS** ■ **HOWLING BANSHEES** ■ **STORM GUARDIANS** ■ **STRIKING SCORPIONS**

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, each time you spend a Battle Focus token to enable that unit to perform an Agile Manoeuvre, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1 Battle Focus token.
Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** shuriken pistol; star glaive.

wargear.en: This model’s star glaive can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 Banshee blade ◦ 1 Scorpion chainsword
This model’s shuriken pistol can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 death spinner ◦ 1 Dragon fusion gun ◦ 1 Dragon fusion pistol ◦ 1 Reaper launcher

fluff.en: With wargear such as a winged pack or warp jump generator, an Autarch becomes an incredibly manoeuvrable war leader. So equipped, they can appear wherever their war host needs them in the blink of an eye, bringing graceful weaponry and consummate strategy to bear before vanishing out of the foe’s reach.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **SWOOPING HAWKS** ■ **WARP SPIDERS**

description.en: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, halve the Damage characteristic of that attack.
While a friendly **AELDARI** unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.
While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** the Wailing Doom

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: The Avatar of Khaine is an ancient war deity incarnate whose mere presence incites merciless rage in the Asuryani around him. In battle, the Avatar marches through enemy fire without breaking stride, laughing cruelly as his weapon – the Wailing Doom – tastes hot flesh and spurts lifeblood with each swing and thrust.

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if that unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. In addition, while this model is leading a unit, when that unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, in your Movement phase, it can use this ability. If it does, that unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.
Each time this model is set up on the battlefield, until the end of the turn, each time this model makes a ranged attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll scores a Critical Hit.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Fury of the Tempest; Shining Blade.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Baharroth moves with the grace of a zephyr and attacks with the force of a hurricane. He shines with a brilliance of his own making in battle, diving into range, opening fire then peeling away to face his next quarry. At close quarters he strikes with the resplendent Shining Blade, lopping off heads with its elegantly curved edge.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **SWOOPING HAWKS**

description.en: At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit was eligible to fight this phase, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D3+3". Otherwise, if this unit was eligible to fight this phase, this unit can make a Fall Back move of up to D3+3”.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** shuriken pistol; Corsair blade.

wargear.en: For every 5 models in the unit, up to 2 Skyreaver models can each have their shuriken pistol and Corsair blade replaced with one of the following*:  ◦ 1 blaster and 1 close combat weapon ◦ 1 flamer and 1 close combat weapon ◦ 1 fusion gun and 1 close combat weapon ◦ 1 shredder and 1 close combat weapon  * You cannot select the same option more than once per unit unless it contains 10 models, in which case you cannot select the same weapon more than twice per unit.
The Skyreaver Felarch can replace its shuriken pistol with one of the following: ◦ 1 blast pistol ◦ 1 neuro disruptor

fluff.en: Equipped with winged jump packs, Corsair Skyreavers are utilised by Anhrathe commanders as mobile shock troops. Leaping recklessly into the fray, they bring to bear an array of dazzling weaponry, relying upon speed, agility and daring to evade incoming strikes and cut their opponents to shreds.

description.en: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re‐roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is within range of an objective marker, you can re‐roll the Hit roll instead.
The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** shuriken pistol; power sword; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: If this unit contains 10 models, 1 Corsair Voidreaver’s shuriken rifle can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 shuriken cannon ◦ 1 wraithcannon
For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Corsair Voidreaver’s power sword or shuriken rifle can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 blaster ◦ 1 shredder
Any number of Corsair Voidreavers in this unit can each have their shuriken pistol and power sword replaced with 1 shuriken rifle.
The Voidreaver Felarch can be equipped with: ◦ 1 mistshield
The Voidreaver Felarch’s shuriken pistol can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 neuro disruptor ◦ 1 shuriken rifle

fluff.en: The skilled and agile warriors known as Voidreavers make up the bulk of most Corsair warbands. With precise volleys of lethal shuriken fire, they can tear through enemy infantry or draw their power swords and storm hostile positions to engage in furious hand‐to‐hand fighting.

description.en: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** and **[PRECISION]** abilities while targeting that unit.
Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.
Once per turn, the first time a saving throw is failed for the bearer’s unit, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.
The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

composition.en: This unit can contain a maximum of 10 models.

loadout.en:
■ **1 Voidscarred Felarch**
■ **4-9 Corsair Voidscarred**
■ **0-1 Shade Runner**
■ **0-1 Soul Weaver**
■ **0-1 Way Seeker**
**Every Corsair Voidscarred and Voidscarred Felarch is equipped with:** shuriken pistol; power sword; close combat weapon.
**A Shade Runner is equipped with:** shuriken pistol; close combat weapon; paired Hekatarii blades.
**A Soul Weaver is equipped with:** shuriken pistol; power sword; close combat weapon; channeller stones.
**A Way Seeker is equipped with:** shuriken pistol; Executioner; close combat weapon; witch staff.

wargear.en: 1 Corsair Voidscarred model equipped with a shuriken pistol and power sword can be equipped with 1 Faolchú.
If this unit contains 10 models, 1 Corsair Voidscarred’s power sword can be replaced with 1 fusion pistol.
If this unit contains 10 models, 1 Corsair Voidscarred’s shuriken rifle can be replaced with 1 long rifle.
If this unit contains 10 models, 1 Corsair Voidscarred’s shuriken rifle can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 shuriken cannon ◦ 1 wraithcannon
For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Corsair Voidscarred’s shuriken rifle can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 blaster ◦ 1 shredder
The Voidscarred Felarch can be equipped with 1 mistshield.
The Voidscarred Felarch’s shuriken pistol can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 neuro disruptor ◦ 1 shuriken rifle
Any number of Corsair Voidscarred can each have their shuriken pistol and power sword replaced with 1 shuriken rifle.

fluff.en: The Voidscarred are veterans hardened by a life of piracy. These Corsairs have travelled the stars for centuries and have seen the worst and the best the galaxy has to offer. Many have developed unique skills and fighting styles and carry specialist wargear into battle over the years.

description.en: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can **FLY**, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** 2 starcannons; pulse laser; wraithbone hull.

wargear.en: This model’s 2 starcannons can be replaced with 2 bright lances.

fluff.en: Crimson Hunters are the sublime pilots of formidable airborne fighters with armaments dedicated to aerial interdiction. With superhuman reflexes, they hunt down and destroy enemy aircraft with sickening ease, their skills honed by nightly training sorties with those of their Aspect shrine.

description.en: Each time an attack targets this model’s unit, if that unit contains one or more other models, until that attack is resolved, this model has a Toughness characteristic of 3.
Each time this model makes an attack with its D‐cannon, re‐roll a Damage roll of 1. If that attack targets a **TITANIC** unit, you can re‐roll the Damage roll instead.

At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this model can join one **GUARDIAN DEFENDERS** unit from your army (a unit cannot have more than one **SUPPORT WEAPON** model joined to it). This model then counts as part of that **GUARDIANS** unit for the rest of the battle, and that unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

This model, and any unit it is joined to, cannot embark within a **TRANSPORT**.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** D‐cannon; shuriken catapult; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Whether deployed as grav‐platform artillery or attached to formations of Guardians, D‐Cannon Platforms provide ferocious mid‐ to close‐range fire support. Their blasts punch through the veil between realspace and the Empyrean, creating localised but spectacularly lethal warp singularities that can swallow victims whole or gouge catastrophic wounds in larger targets.

description.en: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill characteristic and to the Hit roll.

Once per battle for each Aspect Shrine token this unit has, you can change the result of one Hit roll or one Wound roll made for a model in this unit (excluding **CHARACTER** models) to an unmodified 6.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** Reaper launcher; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: For every 5 models in this unit, it can have 1 Aspect Shrine token.
The Dark Reaper Exarch’s Reaper launcher can be replaced with 1 of the following: ◦ 1 missile launcher ◦ 1 shuriken cannon ◦ 1 tempest launcher

fluff.en: Dark Reapers unleash firestorms with their long-ranged Reaper launchers, whether using infantry-shredding starswarm missiles or armour-piercing starshot variants. These salvoes are chillingly accurate, thanks to advanced targeting systems but also the Reapers’ armour, which anchors them firmly to the ground while they fire.

description.en: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle‐shock test. If one or more of those attacks destroyed a model in that enemy unit, subtract 1 from that test.

In your Shooting phase, each time this model is selected to shoot, select one of the abilities below. Until the end of the phase, this model’s shrieker cannon has that ability.
■ **[IGNORES COVER]**
■ **[PRECISION]**
■ **[SUSTAINED HITS 3]**
Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, ignore any vertical distance when determining the total distance the bearer can be moved during that move.
Unless otherwise stated, you cannot include more than one of this model in your army.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** shrieker cannon; Jester’s blade, flip belt.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: A hissing storm of shrieker cannon fire announces the arrival of a Death Jester upon the battlefield. Enemy infantry are torn apart in sprays of blood and scalded flesh as the weapon’s gene‐toxins cause them to combust horrifically from within. Adding insult to injury, the Death Jester ensures every demise is as cruelly ironic as possible.

description.en: Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability while targeting an enemy unit within half range.
The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

Once per battle for each Aspect Shrine token this unit has, you can change the result of one Hit roll or one Wound roll made for a model in this unit (excluding **CHARACTER** models) to an unmodified 6.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** Avenger shuriken catapult, close combat weapon.

wargear.en: For every 5 models in this unit, it can have 1 Aspect Shrine token.
The Dire Avenger Exarch’s shuriken pistol can be replaced with: ◦ 1 shimmershield
If this unit’s Dire Avenger Exarch is equipped with 1 Avenger shuriken catapult, it can be equipped with 1 additional Avenger shuriken catapult.
The Dire Avenger Exarch’s Avenger shuriken catapult can be replaced with 1 shuriken pistol and one of the following: ◦ 1 diresword ◦ 1 power glaive

fluff.en: Furious in attack and immovable in defence, Dire Avengers wield Avenger catapults that unleash punishing bursts of monomolecular shurikens. Drawing on their faultless battle instincts, they always know when to launch lightning-fast assaults and when to fall back and draw the enemy into a kill zone.

name.en: The Staff of Ulthamar and witchblade

description.en: At the start of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP.

At the end of your Movement phase, select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a friendly **AELDARI** model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** Mind War; shuriken pistol; Staff of Ulthamar and witchblade.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: One of the most potent Aeldari psykers ever to have lived, when Eldrad Ulthran takes to the field, his enemies’ plans are already known to him. Such is Eldrad’s psychic might that he can break Titans and banish the mightiest of daemons, and over the millennia, he has slain kings and champions beyond number.

fluff.en: The primary battle tanks of the Asuryani, Falcons mount a diverse array of potent weapons that make them the bane of war machines and foot troops alike. They also boast a transport pod, in which small squads of warriors can be borne to wherever their martial prowess is most needed on the battlefield.

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, once per phase, you can change the result of one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one Damage roll made for a model in that unit (excluding **SUPPORT WEAPON** models) to an unmodified 6.

At the end of your Movement phase, select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a friendly **AELDARI** model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each unit can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

fluff.en: The Asuryani look to their Farseers for leadership in battle. These psykers can uncover the foe’s intentions and calculate the effects of attacks. Their minds are their true weapons; with a thought, they can obliterate the memories of enemy commanders, hurl battle tanks into the air or summon terrifying storms of coruscating eldritch energy.

fluff.en: Farseers are expert combatants as well as battle seers. Their semi‐sentient witchblades and singing spears are embedded with crystals that transmit the destructive potential of their bearer’s psyche. When riding to battle astride sleek jetbikes, they flow around weapon blasts and blade thrusts with a natural grace that makes their foes seem predictable and slow.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **WARLOCK SKYRUNNERS** ■ **WINDRIDERS**

fluff.en: Fire Dragons are aggressive and warlike, seeking nothing less than destroying the enemy’s redoubts and war machines. They can identify a target’s weak points with a glance and then swiftly reduce them to molten liquid with their fusion guns.

Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can re‐roll one Hit roll and you can re‐roll one Wound roll when resolving those attacks.
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: The prism cannon of this vehicle is the bane of heavy battle tanks. In its firing process, a laser is discharged into a massive crystal prism that amplifies the shot’s potency. The energy is released in one of two ways – either as thin lances of light to destroy the toughest vehicles or as a dispersed pulse to slaughter swathes of infantry.

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, add 6" to the Range characteristic of Melta weapons equipped by models in that unit.

The first time this model is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Fuegan has dedicated himself to the destruction of the enemies of the Asuryani, and the trail of corpses he has left in his wake spans the galaxy. Those he sets his fiery gaze upon, he either eradicates from existence with burning blasts from his firepike, Searsong, or cuts in twain with furious blows from the Fire Axe.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **FIRE DRAGONS**

description.en: This unit can perform the Fade Back Agile Manoeuvre without spending a Battle Focus token to do so. It can do so even if other units have done so in the same phase, and doing so does not prevent other units from performing the same Agile Manoeuvre in the same phase.
When the last Guardian Defender model in this unit is destroyed, any remaining Heavy Weapon Platform models in this unit are also destroyed.

fluff.en: Guardian Defenders are versatile support troops capable of unleashing withering hails of fire from their shuriken catapults. They also man anti‐grav Heavy Weapon Platforms that can be fitted with various powerful guns to sunder enemy armour or mow down swathes of infantry.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Hemlocks blend their Spiritseer pilots’ psychic abilities with the gestalt energies of dead Aeldari, who can pilot the craft should the seer be incapacitated. The aircraft’s mindshock pod unleashes waves of negative emotion to cause terror in the enemy while its heavy D‐scythes hurl the Hemlock’s victims into the Warp.

description.en: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

Once per battle for each Aspect Shrine token this unit has, you can change the result of one Hit roll or one Wound roll made for a model in this unit (excluding **CHARACTER** models) to an unmodified 6.

fluff.en: Howling Banshees are deadly in hand‐to‐hand fighting and renowned for their rapid strikes. Their Banshee masks contain psychosonic amplifiers that magnify the wearer’s keening battle screams into a mind‐destroying shock wave. This aural assault inspires terror and paralysis in the foe as the Aspect Warriors move in for the kill.

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and each time a model in that unit makes an Advance move, ignore any vertical distance when determining the total distance that model can be moved during that move.
Each time this model makes an attack that targets a **CHARACTER** unit, you can re‐roll the Wound roll.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Always at the front of a charge and famed for her speed and ferocity, Jain Zar carries the Blade of Destruction, an ancient executioner. She whirls it in bloody arcs to carve through foes before vaulting into a new position. With a flick of her wrist, she unleashes the Silent Death, a triple‐bladed throwing weapon that can easily sever a foe’s head.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **HOWLING BANSHEES**

Until the end of the turn, that unit is riven. Each time an **AELDARI** model from your army makes an attack that targets a riven unit, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: The most gifted Void Dreamer to have ever lived, Kharseth can sense the minutest fluctuations in the fabric of reality, detecting warp translations and other empyric disturbances and directing the fire of allies with terrifying precision. So too can they wield the energies of the Warp and unleash freezing energies of the void upon their enemies.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **CORSAIR REAVER BAND** ■ **CORSAIR VOIDREAVERS** ■ **CORSAIR VOIDSCARRED**

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Lhykhis strikes like an ambush predator from the Empyrean, sowing murderous bloodshed amongst the foe. With each hissing discharge of the Brood Twain, she reduces enemies to sliced sacks of sloshing gore. With Weaverender and her Spider’s Fangs, she picks apart her victims at close quarters before vanishing again into the web of the Warp.

On a 5+, the unit being rolled for is struck by explosive debris; after resolving all of that unit’s attacks against the target unit, each unit struck by explosive debris suffers D3 mortal wounds.

fluff.en: A master at killing from a distance, Maugan Ra wields the Maugetar. This scythe‐like weapon fires mind‐linked shuriken discs large enough to decapitate a swathe of foes before vanishing into nothingness. Should the enemy survive this barrage, they will meet a swift end on the curved edge of the Maugetar’s built‐in reaping blade.

leader.en: This model can be attached to the following units:  ■ **DARK REAPERS**

So strong is this substance that nothing can stop its descent, and any foe lying beneath it faces a horrible death as the razor‐sharp strands fall first upon and then through them.

fluff.en: Phantoms reign as the pinnacle of war-craft, their towering forms wreathed in protective distort fields and invested with ruinous weaponry. To pilot one requires flawless poise and judgement; its steersman must enter a trancelike state, merging with the spirits within so that the Phantom becomes a near-unstoppable god of war.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: A noble scion of Craftworld Iyanden, Prince Yriel has walked many paths. Equally adept at commanding vast warfleets and leading great hosts of Anhrathe raiders to war, he is also a skilled combatant. Yriel wields the Spear of Twilight with superlative grace and dexterity and can pierce the guards of even the most vaunted duellists.

fluff.en: These Outcast warriors are adept in stealth warfare, marksmanship and tracking their enemies through the harshest terrain. Veiled by cameleoline cloaks and gloom field generators, they can hide from their foes even in plain sight as they pick them off one by one from extreme range.

This model’s Revenant pulsar can be replaced with 1 sonic lance.

fluff.en: Revenants are graceful wraith constructs armed with paired pulsars – high-yield laser weapons that are the bane of heavy armour. Other Revenants wield sophisticated sonic lances, which emit resonant noise that shakes apart everything it hits. Survivors are soon wiped out by its cloudburst missiles, or simply crushed.

description.en: Each time an attack targets this model’s unit, if that unit contains one or more other models, until that attack is resolved, this model has a Toughness characteristic of 3.

In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with its shadow weaver. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is snared. While a unit is snared, each time that unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, roll one D6 for each model in that unit: for each 1, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this model can join one **GUARDIAN DEFENDERS** unit from your army (a unit cannot have more than one **SUPPORT WEAPON** model joined to it). This model then counts as part of that **GUARDIANS** unit for the rest of the battle, and that unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

This model, and any unit it is joined to, cannot embark within a **TRANSPORT**.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Cruel and terrible weapons, shadow weavers project spools of monofilament wire skywards above the foe. Spreading into a lethal web, the wire falls silently into the enemy ranks, slicing irresistibly through armour, meat and bone before settling, snowflake soft, amidst the gruesomely butchered remains of all those caught beneath its descending strands.

fluff.en: Shadowseers can blind their enemies and drive them mad with their psychic powers. They shield their allies with veils of illusion and salvoes of hallucinogen grenades from their criedann launchers and crush bones in close combat with strikes from their miststaves – which also scramble the perceptions of those they hit.

fluff.en: Shining Spears live to joust, which they do at breathtaking speeds upon their jetbike steeds. Their chosen weapon is the long and formidable laser lance, which burns an opening in the target with a powerful energy blast an instant before the bulk of the weapon slams home with a devastating, piercing impact.

fluff.en: Streaking into battle as barely perceived blurs, Shroud Runners effortlessly outmanoeuvre their enemies while harassing them with pinpoint sniper fire. Each jetbike is the mount for a pair of skilled Aeldari Rangers, the pillion rider often entering a marksman’s trance to aim and fire while travelling at incredible speeds.

Any number of models can each have their shuriken cannon replaced with 1 Skyweaver haywire cannon.

fluff.en: Skyweavers shoot through the air in a prismatic storm of hallucinatory colour and light. While the riders known as Skyborne Princes pilot each jetbike and operate its guns, those called Great Falcons ride pillion, poised to cut down the foe with their star bolas or bisect them with their sweeping zephyrglaives.

description.en: Once per battle, in your Movement phase, before this model makes a Normal move, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the turn, add 2D6" to this model’s Move characteristic and add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s Solitaire weapons.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Solitaires are the equal of a host of lesser warriors, and can move at speeds the naked eye cannot follow. In combat, their scything kicks and hammer-blow punches come so fast their foes are dead before they know they are in a fight. They sever heads and pierce hearts in a rapid blur of movement, and cause blood to fall like monsoon rain.

description.en: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly **WRAITH CONSTRUCT** units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

Once per turn, in your Movement phase, when this model starts or ends a move, select one friendly **WRAITH CONSTRUCT** unit within 6" of this model (excluding **TITANIC** units) and one enemy unit visible to this model. Until the start of your next Movement phase, weapons equipped by models in that friendly unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability while targeting that enemy unit.

Otherwise, one model in that unit regains up to D3 lost wounds. Each unit can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** shuriken pistol; witch staff.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: It falls to the Spiritseers to commune with the souls of the dead. In this capacity, they guide ghost warriors through the inferno of battle, bringing the world around them into greater focus. Aided in this way, ghost warriors become yet more lethal, their strikes and shots ensuring the swift demise of their foes.

description.en: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, this unit can use this ability. If it does, select one **AELDARI INFANTRY** unit from your army visible to and within 36” of this unit: until the end of the phase, that unit has the Stealth ability.

Armed with a turret-mounted disintegrator cannon and underslung Starfang grenade launcher, this swift skimmer provides Anhrathe raiding forces with much needed firepower.

Unless that unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can embark within this **TRANSPORT**. That unit can embark within this **TRANSPORT** in a turn it disembarked from this **TRANSPORT**.

Armed with multiple heavy weapons, they provide great volumes of supporting fire for the troops they carry, scything down the foe with withering hails of shuriken.

transport.en: This model has a transport capacity of 6 **HARLEQUINS INFANTRY** models.

fluff.en: Storm Guardians often support Aspect Warriors in close combat, wielding their pistols and blades with all the grace and skill of their kind. Other Storm Guardians bring special weapons to bear, burning foes out of cover with bursts from their flamers or melting through armoured bunkers with their fusion guns.
